{"additions":4987,"baseRefName":"main","body":"## Context

Integrates a Telegram bot into MyPocket for expense registration, CSV import, and budget queries via chat. Also adds a centralized deduplication module that prevents duplicate transactions across both the bot and web app.

### What's included

- **Deduplication module** (`src/lib/dedup.ts`): Centralized duplicate detection (exact match on description + amount + same day). Integrated into existing CSV import endpoint.
- **Telegram bot core** (`src/lib/telegram/`): API client, update router, message parser, command handlers, and query formatters вҖ” all using raw `fetch` (no external Telegram lib).
- **Webhook endpoint** (`/api/telegram/webhook`): Secret-validated POST endpoint with auth middleware exception.
- **Account linking** (`/api/telegram/link`): Deep link flow with 10-minute expiring tokens. `/start` command validates and creates link.
- **Expense registration**: Parse free-text messages (`"PIX RESTAURANTE 45,90 05/03/2026"`), auto-categorize, confirm via inline keyboard with category change support.
- **CSV import via bot**: Send `.csv` file вҶ’ bot parses, deduplicates, shows summary вҶ’ confirm to import.
- **Query commands**: `/menu` with summary, category breakdown, and paginated transaction history.
- **Settings UI**: New "Telegram" tab with link/unlink functionality.

### New environment variables required

- `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` вҖ” Bot token from @BotFather
- `TELEGRAM_BOT_USERNAME` вҖ” Bot username (without @)
- `TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET` вҖ” Secret for webhook validation
- `TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET` вҖ” Secret for the setup endpoint

### Schema changes (additive only)

3 new Prisma models: `TelegramLink`, `TelegramLinkToken`, `TelegramPendingImport`. No changes to existing models.

### Test coverage

28 new tests: dedup (5), parser (7), link API (8), commands (8). All passing. 3 new integration tests for import dedup.","comments":[{"id":"IC_kwDORDToqM7vglNh","author":{"login":"vercel"},"authorAssociation":"NONE","body":"[vc]: #REDACTED:REDACTED

+# Bot Telegram MyPocket вҖ” Plano de ImplementaГ§ГЈo
+
+## Overview
+
+Integrar um bot Telegram ao MyPocket para registrar despesas, importar faturas CSV e consultar orГ§amentos/gastos via chat. Inclui deduplicaГ§ГЈo centralizada para evitar transaГ§Гөes duplicadas tanto no bot quanto no app web.
+
+## Current State Analysis
+
+- **Sem deduplicaГ§ГЈo:** importar o mesmo CSV duas vezes cria duplicatas (`src/app/api/import/route.ts:166-186` cria transaГ§Гөes incondicionalmente)
+- **Sem integraГ§ГЈo Telegram:** nenhum modelo, endpoint ou lГіgica de bot existe
+- **Settings extensГӯvel:** pГЎgina de settings (`src/app/settings/page.tsx:528-554`) usa tabs Radix вҖ” nova aba Г© direta
+- **Middleware restritivo:** `src/auth.config.ts:11-28` bloqueia todas as rotas nГЈo-auth вҖ” webhook precisa de exceГ§ГЈo
+- **Summary endpoint reutilizГЎvel:** `GET /api/summary` retorna totais, breakdown por categoria e alertas de orГ§amento вҖ” ideal para consultas do bot
+- **Categorizer reutilizГЎvel:** `src/lib/categorizer.ts:95-109` faz auto-categorizaГ§ГЈo por keywords вҖ” bot pode usar diretamente
+- **CSV parser reutilizГЎvel:** `src/lib/csv-parser.ts:151` detecta banco e parseia вҖ” bot pode chamar diretamente
+
+## Desired End State
+
+1. MГіdulo de deduplicaГ§ГЈo centralizado previne transaГ§Гөes duplicatas em toda a aplicaГ§ГЈo
+2. Bot Telegram funcional com: vinculaГ§ГЈo por deep link, registro de despesas via texto, importaГ§ГЈo CSV, consultas de resumo/categorias/transaГ§Гөes
+3. Nova aba "Telegram" na pГЎgina de settings com botГЈo de vincular/desvincular
+4. Webhook seguro integrado ao Next.js sem dependГӘncias externas pesadas
+
...
</persisted-output>

@@ -0,0 +1,179 @@
+# Bot Telegram MyPocket вҖ” Plano de ImplementaГ§ГЈo
+
+## Overview
+
+Integrar um bot Telegram ao MyPocket para registrar despesas, importar faturas CSV e consultar orГ§amentos/gastos via chat. Inclui deduplicaГ§ГЈo centralizada para evitar transaГ§Гөes duplicadas tanto no bot quanto no app web.
+
+## Current State Analysis
+
+- **Sem deduplicaГ§ГЈo:** importar o mesmo CSV duas vezes cria duplicatas (`src/app/api/import/route.ts:166-186` cria transaГ§Гөes incondicionalmente)
+- **Sem integraГ§ГЈo Telegram:** nenhum modelo, endpoint ou lГіgica de bot existe
+- **Settings extensГӯvel:** pГЎgina de settings (`src/app/settings/page.tsx:528-554`) usa tabs Radix вҖ” nova aba Г© direta
+- **Middleware restritivo:** `src/auth.config.ts:11-28` bloqueia todas as rotas nГЈo-auth вҖ” webhook precisa de exceГ§ГЈo
+- **Summary endpoint reutilizГЎvel:** `GET /api/summary` retorna totais, breakdown por categoria e alertas de orГ§amento вҖ” ideal para consultas do bot
+- **Categorizer reutilizГЎvel:** `src/lib/categorizer.ts:95-109` faz auto-categorizaГ§ГЈo por keywords вҖ” bot pode usar diretamente
+- **CSV parser reutilizГЎvel:** `src/lib/csv-parser.ts:151` detecta banco e parseia вҖ” bot pode chamar diretamente
+
+## Desired End State
+
+1. MГіdulo de deduplicaГ§ГЈo centralizado previne transaГ§Гөes duplicatas em toda a aplicaГ§ГЈo
+2. Bot Telegram funcional com: vinculaГ§ГЈo por deep link, registro de despesas via texto, importaГ§ГЈo CSV, consultas de resumo/categorias/transaГ§Гөes
+3. Nova aba "Telegram" na pГЎgina de settings com botГЈo de vincular/desvincular
+4. Webhook seguro integrado ao Next.js sem dependГӘncias externas pesadas
+
+**VerificaГ§ГЈo:** Enviar mensagem de texto com dados de transaГ§ГЈo no Telegram вҶ’ transaГ§ГЈo aparece no dashboard web. Importar mesmo CSV via bot e via web вҶ’ sem duplicatas.
+
+## What We're NOT Doing
+
+- Interface de IA/NLP вҖ” apenas comandos e formatos estruturados
+- NotificaГ§Гөes proativas do bot (alertas de orГ§amento, lembretes)
+- Suporte a WhatsApp ou outros mensageiros
+- OCR de prints/fotos via bot (apenas texto e CSV)
+- PaginaГ§ГЈo server-side no endpoint de transaГ§Гөes existente
+
+---
+
+## Related Documentation
+
+| Document | RelevГўncia |
+|----------|-----------|
+| `ai_docs/brainstorm/2026-03-07-telegram-bot-design.md` | Design validado com todas as decisГөes |
+| `ai_docs/research/2026-03-07-telegram-bot-research.md` | Pesquisa detalhada do codebase |
+| `ai_docs/diagrams/api-flows.md` | Fluxos de API existentes |
+| `ai_docs/diagrams/data-models.md` | Diagrama ER das entidades |
+| `src/app/api/import/route.ts` | Fluxo de importaГ§ГЈo a ser modificado com dedup |
+| `src/app/api/summary/route.ts` | Queries do dashboard a reutilizar para consultas do bot |
+
+**Scope Warning:** Este plano cobre o bot Telegram, dedup, e a aba de settings. NГЈo assume comportamento de investments, recurring expenses, ou OCR.
+
+---
+
+## Risks & Mitigations
+
+| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
+|------|------------|--------|------------|
+| Telegram webhook nГЈo alcanГ§ГЎvel em dev local | H | M | Usar ngrok/localtunnel para expor URL local; endpoint de setup aceita URL customizada |
+| Dedup falso positivo (pular transaГ§ГЈo legГӯtima) | L | H | Match exato (description case-insensitive + amount + date mesmo dia) вҖ” conservador por design |
+| Middleware bloqueia webhook requests | M | H | Adicionar exceГ§ГЈo explГӯcita em auth.config.ts; testar com request sem session |
+| Telegram File API timeout para CSVs grandes | L | M | Limitar tamanho de arquivo (20MB вҖ” limite do Telegram); timeout generoso no fetch |
+| Schema migration quebra banco existente | L | H | Novos modelos apenas (additive) вҖ” sem alteraГ§ГЈo em modelos existentes |
+
+---
+
+## Phases
+
+| # | Phase | File | Summary | Status | Depends On |
+|---|-------|------|---------|--------|------------|
+| 1 | Schema + DeduplicaГ§ГЈo | `phase-1-schema-dedup.md` | Modelos Prisma + mГіdulo dedup + integraГ§ГЈo na importaГ§ГЈo | complete | вҖ” |
+| 2 | Core do Bot + Webhook | `phase-2-bot-core.md` | Cliente Telegram, webhook endpoint, handler principal | complete | Phase 1 |
+| 3 | VinculaГ§ГЈo via Deep Link | `phase-3-linking.md` | API de tokens, comando /start, aba Settings | complete | Phase 2 |
+| 4 | Registro de Despesas | `phase-4-expense-registration.md` | Parser de mensagens, confirmaГ§ГЈo com keyboard, criaГ§ГЈo de transaГ§ГЈo | complete | Phase 3 |
+| 5 | CSV Import + Consultas | `phase-5-csv-queries.md` | ImportaГ§ГЈo CSV via bot, menu de consultas | complete | Phase 4 |
+
+---
+
+## Success Criteria Dashboard
+
+### Phase 1: Schema + DeduplicaГ§ГЈo
+| Criteria | Type | Status |
+|----------|------|--------|
+| `Skill(running-automated-checks)` | auto | pass |
+| `npm run db:generate` executa sem erros | auto | pass |
+
+### Phase 2: Core do Bot + Webhook
+| Criteria | Type | Status |
+|----------|------|--------|
+| `Skill(running-automated-checks)` | auto | pass |
+
+### Phase 3: VinculaГ§ГЈo via Deep Link
+| Criteria | Type | Status |
+|----------|------|--------|
+| `Skill(running-automated-checks)` | auto | pass |
+| Vincular conta via deep link no Telegram (requer bot token real) | manual | pending |
+
+### Phase 4: Registro de Despesas
+| Criteria | Type | Status |
+|----------|------|--------|
+| `Skill(running-automated-checks)` | auto | pass |
+
+### Phase 5: CSV Import + Consultas
+| Criteria | Type | Status |
+|----------|------|--------|
+| `Skill(running-automated-checks)` | auto | pass |
+| Enviar CSV via Telegram e verificar importaГ§ГЈo no dashboard | manual | pending |
+
+### Final Verification (after all phases)
+| Criteria | Type | Status |
+|----------|------|--------|
+| `Skill(reviewing-code)` | auto | pass |
+| `Skill(validating-implementation)` | auto | pending |
+
+---
+
+## Known Executor Risks
+
+| Scenario | Likelihood | Fallback |
+|----------|------------|----------|
+| Prisma migration path differs between PostgreSQL and SQLite | M | Usar `db:push` em dev, `db:migrate` para criaГ§ГЈo formal |
+| `parseCSV` requer `origin` como segundo parГўmetro | M | Verificar signature antes de chamar; origin pode ser "Telegram" |
+| Settings page Г© muito grande (~1200 linhas) | H | Executor deve usar Edit cirГәrgico com strings Гәnicas para inserir tab |
+| Telegram API types nГЈo disponГӯveis sem lib | L | Definir tipos inline para Update, Message, CallbackQuery |
+| Setup endpoint chamado por usuГЎrio nГЈo-admin | M | Endpoint protegido por `TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET` header |
+
+---
+
+## Completeness Verification
+
+```
+100% Rule Verification:
+- [x] Every file mentioned in research is addressed in plan
+- [x] No work will be discovered during implementation
+- [x] All dependencies between tasks are explicit
+- [x] Each phase is independently shippable
+- [x] All tasks have Given-When-Then acceptance criteria
+- [x] All tasks have Reference Docs listed
+- [x] No gaps between phases (nothing falls through cracks)
+- [x] No overlaps (no work duplicated across tasks)
+```
+
+---
+
+## Implementation Notes
+
+### PadrГөes a seguir
+- API routes: `getAuthenticatedUserId()` para rotas autenticadas, validaГ§ГЈo de `TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET` para webhook
+- Prisma queries sempre filtram por `userId`
+- Textos de UI e respostas do bot em PT-BR
+- Amounts: negativo para despesas, positivo para receitas
+- Datas: append `T12:00:00` para evitar timezone issues
+
+### Telegram API
+- Usar `fetch` direto ao invГ©s de dependГӘncia externa
+- Base URL: `https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/`
+- Webhook secret via header `X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token`
+- File download: `https://api.telegram.org/file/bot${TOKEN}/${file_path}`
+
+### Code Design Principles
+**Project rules are the source of truth.** Before writing code, load:
+1. `CLAUDE.md` in project root
+2. `$HOME/.claude/docs/code-principles.md` (fallback)
+
+---
+
+## Learnings
+
+1. **Prisma/DB:** Projeto usa PostgreSQL com Neon adapter (driverAdapters preview). `db:generate` funciona sem DATABASE_URL mas `db:push` e `build` requerem a variГЎvel.
+2. **Dedup:** Match exato (description case-insensitive + amount + mesmo dia) Г© conservador e evita falsos positivos.
+3. **Middleware:** ExceГ§ГЈo no auth usa `===` (match exato) ao invГ©s de `startsWith` para evitar bypass em sub-rotas.
+4. **Telegram sem lib:** Tipos definidos inline, `fetch` direto para API вҖ” funcional sem dependГӘncia externa.
+5. **Settings page:** ~1200 linhas вҖ” ediГ§ГЈo cirГәrgica com strings de contexto Гәnicas funciona bem.
+6. **Category change flow:** `handleShowCategories` e `handleSetCategory` precisam preservar as linhas de dados (рҹ“қрҹ’°рҹ“…) da despesa no texto da mensagem, senГЈo `handleConfirmExpense` nГЈo consegue parsear os dados apГіs troca de categoria.
+7. **MapIterator spread:** `[...map.entries()]` nГЈo funciona com o target ES do projeto; usar `Array.from(map.entries())`.
+

+- Similar: `src/app/api/import/route.ts` (import flow), `src/app/api/summary/route.ts` (dashboard queries)

+**Why**: LГіgica centralizada para detectar transaГ§Гөes duplicatas. Usada pelo import web, pelo bot (registro avulso), e pela importaГ§ГЈo CSV via bot.
+
+**Acceptance Criteria**:
+```gherkin
+Given a transaction exists with description "PIX REST FULANO", amount -45.90, date 2026-03-05
+When findDuplicate is called with same description (case-insensitive), same amount, same date
+Then it returns the existing transaction
+
+Given a transaction exists with description "PIX REST FULANO", amount -45.90, date 2026-03-05
+When findDuplicate is called with different description "UBER TRIP"
+Then it returns null
+
+Given a transaction exists but is soft-deleted (deletedAt is set)
+When findDuplicate is called with matching description, amount, date
+Then it returns null (ignores deleted transactions)
+
+Given a transaction with description "PIX REST FULANO", amount -45.90, date 2026-03-05T15:30:00
+When findDuplicate is called with same description, same amount, date 2026-03-05T08:00:00
+Then it returns the existing transaction (same day, different time)
+```
+
+**Implementation**:
+
+`src/lib/dedup.ts`:
+```typescript
+import prisma from "@/lib/db"
+
+export interface DuplicateCheckParams {
+  userId: string
+  description: string
+  amount: number
+  date: Date
+}
+
+export async function findDuplicate({
+  userId,
+  description,
+  amount,
+  date,
+}: DuplicateCheckParams) {
+  // Normalize date to start/end of day
+  const dayStart = new Date(date)
+  dayStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
+  const dayEnd = new Date(date)
+  dayEnd.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999)
+
+  const duplicate = await prisma.transaction.findFirst({
+    where: {
+      userId,
+      description: {
+        equals: description.trim(),
+        mode: "insensitive",
+      },
+      amount,
+      date: {
+        gte: dayStart,
+        lte: dayEnd,
+      },
+      deletedAt: null,
+    },
+  })
+
+  return duplicate
+}
+
+export async function filterDuplicates(
+  userId: string,
+  transactions: Array<{ description: string; amount: number; date: Date }>
+): Promise<{ unique: typeof transactions; duplicateCount: number }> {
+  const unique: typeof transactions = []
+  let duplicateCount = 0
+
+  for (const t of transactions) {
+    const dup = await findDuplicate({
+      userId,
+      description: t.description,
+      amount: t.amount,
+      date: t.date,
+    })
+    if (dup) {
+      duplicateCount++
+    } else {
+      unique.push(t)
+    }
+  }
+
+  return { unique, duplicateCount }
+}
+```

+# Phase 2: Core do Bot + Webhook
+
+## Overview
+
+Criar o cliente Telegram (wrapper de fetch para a API), o webhook endpoint integrado ao Next.js, e o handler principal que roteia comandos e valida vinculaГ§ГЈo de conta. ApГіs esta fase, o webhook recebe mensagens do Telegram e responde com mensagem de "conta nГЈo vinculada".
+
+## Reference Docs for This Phase
+- `src/auth.config.ts` (full file) - Middleware config para adicionar exceГ§ГЈo
+- `src/lib/db.ts` (full file) - PadrГЈo de import do Prisma client
+- `src/app/api/import/route.ts` (lines 1-5) - PadrГЈo de imports em API routes
+- Telegram Bot API: `https://core.telegram.org/bots/api`
+
+## Changes Required
+
+#### 1. Create Telegram API client and bot handler
+
+- [x] **COMPLETE**
+  - **Learning:** O worktree compartilha `node_modules` com o repo principal, mas `.prisma/client` Г© gerado localmente. Para `tsc` funcionar, foi necessГЎrio copiar os tipos gerados para o `.prisma/client` do repo principal, pois `@prisma/client` re-exporta de `.prisma/client/default` que resolve do repo principal.
+
+**File**: `src/lib/telegram/client.ts` (CREATE) + `src/lib/telegram/bot.ts` (CREATE)
+**Complexity**: Medium
+**TDD**: NO вҖ” pure HTTP wiring with no decision logic
+**Depends On**: none
+
+**Load Before Implementing**:
+1. `src/lib/db.ts` (full file) - Import pattern for Prisma
+
+**Pre-conditions**:
+- [ ] Directory `src/lib/telegram/` can be created
+- [ ] Environment variable `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` will be set
+
+**Why**: O client abstrai chamadas Г  API do Telegram. O bot handler roteia updates recebidos para os comandos corretos e valida a vinculaГ§ГЈo de conta.
+
+**Acceptance Criteria**:
+```gherkin
+Given a valid Telegram Bot Token
+When sendMessage is called with a chatId and text
+Then a POST request is made to https://api.telegram.org/bot{token}/sendMessage
+
+Given an update with a text message from a linked account
+When handleUpdate is called
+Then the message is routed to the appropriate command handler
+
+Given an update from an unlinked chatId
+When handleUpdate is called
+Then a message is sent asking the user to link their account
+```
+
+**Implementation**:
+
+`src/lib/telegram/client.ts`:
+```typescript
+const TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}`
+
+export interface TelegramUpdate {
+  update_id: number
+  message?: TelegramMessage
+  callback_query?: TelegramCallbackQuery
+}
+
+export interface TelegramMessage {
+  message_id: number
+  from?: { id: number; first_name: string }
+  chat: { id: number; type: string }
+  date: number
+  text?: string
+  document?: TelegramDocument
+}
+
+export interface TelegramCallbackQuery {
+  id: string
+  from: { id: number; first_name: string }
+  message?: TelegramMessage
+  data?: string
+}
+
+export interface TelegramDocument {
+  file_id: string
+  file_name?: string
+  mime_type?: string
+  file_size?: number
+}
+
+export interface InlineKeyboardButton {
+  text: string
+  callback_data: string
+}
+
+export async function sendMessage(
+  chatId: number | string,
+  text: string,
+  options?: {
+    reply_markup?: {
+      inline_keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][]
+    }
+    parse_mode?: "HTML" | "Markdown" | "MarkdownV2"
+  }
+) {
+  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/sendMessage`, {
+    method: "POST",
+    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+    body: JSON.stringify({
+      chat_id: chatId,
+      text,
+      ...options,
+    }),
+  })
+  return res.json()
+}
+
+export async function answerCallbackQuery(
+  callbackQueryId: string,
+  text?: string
+) {
+  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/answerCallbackQuery`, {
+    method: "POST",
+    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+    body: JSON.stringify({
+      callback_query_id: callbackQueryId,
+      text,
+    }),
+  })
+  return res.json()
+}
+
+export async function editMessageText(
+  chatId: number | string,
+  messageId: number,
+  text: string,
+  options?: {
+    reply_markup?: {
+      inline_keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][]
+    }
+    parse_mode?: "HTML" | "Markdown" | "MarkdownV2"
+  }
+) {
+  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/editMessageText`, {
+    method: "POST",
+    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+    body: JSON.stringify({
+      chat_id: chatId,
+      message_id: messageId,
+      text,
+      ...options,
+    }),
+  })
+  return res.json()
+}
+
+export async function getFile(fileId: string) {
+  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/getFile`, {
+    method: "POST",
+    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+    body: JSON.stringify({ file_id: fileId }),
+  })
+  const data = await res.json()
+  return data.result?.file_path as string | undefined
+}
+
+export async function downloadFile(filePath: string): Promise<string> {
+  const url = `https://api.telegram.org/file/bot${process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/${filePath}`
+  const res = await fetch(url)
+  return res.text()
+}
+
+export async function setWebhook(url: string, secretToken: string) {
+  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/setWebhook`, {

Read the full PR diff saved at /Users/victor/.REDACTED.txt and do a thorough code review.

This is a PR that adds Telegram bot integration to a Next.js personal finance app (MyPocket). It includes:
- Deduplication module
- Telegram bot core (API client, update router, message parser, command handlers)
- Webhook endpoint
- Account linking flow
- Expense registration via text
- CSV import via bot
- Query commands
- Settings UI for link/unlink

Review for:
1. **Security issues** - especially around the webhook, auth, token handling, account linking
2. **Code quality** - patterns, error handling, edge cases
3. **Architecture** - separation of concerns, reusability
4. **Bugs or logic errors**
5. **Test coverage gaps**
6. **Performance concerns**

Read the full diff file and also read these key source files from the repo to understand context:
- /Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/auth.config.ts
- /Users/victor/conductor/workspaces/expense-control/phoenix/src/app/api/import/route.ts

Provide a structured review with findings categorized by severity (critical, important, minor, nit).

content.text:
The files are in the PR diff but not on the current branch yet. I have enough information from the full diff to provide a thorough review. Let me compile my findings.

---

## Code Review: Telegram Bot Integration PR

### CRITICAL

**1. Setup endpoint missing middleware exception -- accessible but unprotected against auth redirect**

The `/api/telegram/setup` endpoint is protected by `x-setup-secret` header, but it's NOT added to the middleware exception list in `auth.config.ts`. Only `/api/telegram/webhook` was added. This means unauthenticated requests to `/api/telegram/setup` will be redirected to login by the middleware before the route handler ever runs. The setup endpoint will be unusable when called via `curl` without a session cookie.

**File:** `/src/auth.config.ts`

**Fix:** Either add `/api/telegram/setup` to the middleware exceptions (with the `===` exact match pattern already used), or document that setup must be done by an authenticated user (and use `getAuthenticatedUserId` instead of the custom secret header).

---

**2. `handleCsvConfirm` does NOT verify that the pending import belongs to the requesting user**

In `commands.ts`, `handleCsvConfirm` fetches the pending import by `id` only and never checks `pending.userId === userId`. A malicious user who knows/guesses the `importId` (a cuid) could confirm another user's pending import, causing transactions to be created under `userId` (from the bot link) rather than the original uploader. While the `userId` used for `prisma.transaction.create` comes from the bot link (not the pending import), the actual transaction data (payload) comes from the pending import of a potentially different user.

**File:** `/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts` -- `handleCsvConfirm` function

**Fix:** Add `if (pending.userId !== userId)` check after fetching the pending import.

---

**3. Webhook secret comparison is not timing-safe**

In `/src/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts`, the webhook secret is compared using `!==` (strict equality). This is vulnerable to timing attacks that could allow an attacker to brute-force the secret byte by byte.

**File:** `/src/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts`

**Fix:** Use `crypto.timingSafeEqual` for the comparison:
```typescript
import { timingSafeEqual } from "crypto"
const expected = Buffer.from(process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET || "")
const received = Buffer.from(secret || "")
if (expected.length !== received.length || !timingSafeEqual(expected, received)) {
  return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
}
```

---

### IMPORTANT

**4. `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` evaluated at module load time in `client.ts`**

Line 1 of `client.ts`:
```typescript
const TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}`
```

This is evaluated when the module is first imported, which happens at build/startup time. If the env var isn't set at that moment, the URL will contain `undefined`. This is a common Next.js footgun -- if the module gets imported during build (SSG/ISR), the token will be baked in as `undefined`.

**Fix:** Use a getter function or lazy initialization:
```typescript
function getTelegramApi() {
  return `https://api.telegram.org/bot${process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}`
}
```

---

**5. `handleConfirmExpense` parses transaction data from message text -- fragile and manipulable**

The `handleConfirmExpense` function extracts description, amount, and date by parsing emoji-prefixed lines from the Telegram message text. This has two problems:

a) **Fragility:** If `formatCurrency` output changes format (e.g., uses non-breaking spaces or different separators), the regex `.replace("R$", "").replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", ".")` will break silently and produce `NaN`.

b) **Manipulation risk:** Telegram's `editMessageText` API doesn't prevent a sophisticated attacker from crafting a callback query with a modified `message.text`. The Telegram Bot API includes the message in callback queries, but it's the *current* message text, which the bot itself wrote. However, if Telegram's callback payload is ever spoofed (the webhook secret mitigates this), the amount could be manipulated.

**File:** `/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts` -- `handleConfirmExpense`

**Suggestion:** Store the parsed expense data in the database (like `TelegramPendingImport` is used for CSV) or in the callback_data itself (if it fits within 64 bytes). Parsing from message text is a code smell.

---

**6. `handleSetCategory` does not validate that the category belongs to the user**

In `handleSetCategory`, `prisma.category.findUnique({ where: { id: categoryId } })` fetches any category by ID without filtering by `userId`. A user could potentially set a category belonging to another user by crafting a callback with a known category ID.

**File:** `/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts` -- `handleSetCategory`

**Fix:** Add `userId` to the query, but this requires passing `userId` through. Currently the function doesn't receive `userId`.

---

**7. `handleShowCategories` does not filter investment-related categories**

The category query fetches all categories for the user. If there are categories used exclusively for investments or transfers, they'll show up in the expense category picker. This is a minor UX issue but worth noting.

---

**8. CSV import via bot skips recurring expense matching, carryover detection, and `importBatchId`**

The web import at `/src/app/api/import/route.ts` does: recurring expense matching, carryover detection, category tag validation, and assigns an `importBatchId`. The bot's `handleCsvConfirm` skips ALL of these. This means:
- CSV imports via bot cannot be batch-undone (no `importBatchId`)
- Recurring expenses won't be linked
- Carryover transactions won't be detected

**File:** `/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts` -- `handleCsvConfirm`

**Suggestion:** Extract the import loop from `/src/app/api/import/route.ts` into a shared service function that both the API route and the bot can call. This would prevent feature drift.

---

**9. `filterDuplicates` function is defined but never used**

The exported `filterDuplicates` in `dedup.ts` is not used anywhere in the codebase. Both the import route and the bot manually loop and call `findDuplicate` individually.

**File:** `/src/lib/dedup.ts`

---

**10. N+1 query problem in dedup checking**

Both the import route and the bot's CSV handler call `findDuplicate` inside a loop, issuing one `findFirst` query per transaction. For a CSV with 200 transactions, this means 200 individual database queries. 

**Suggestion:** Batch the dedup check by fetching all potential duplicates for the date range in a single query, then matching in memory.

---

### MINOR

**11. `handleUnlinkCommand` allows unlinking via bot without confirmation**

`/desvincular` immediately deletes the link. No confirmation step. A user who accidentally types the command loses their link. Consider adding an inline keyboard confirmation like the expense flow does.

---

**12. `parseCSV` called with hardcoded origin "Telegram"**

In `handleDocumentMessage`, the origin is set to `"Telegram"`. However, the CSV may come from C6, Itau, or BTG. The `parseCSV` function detects the bank format, but the origin passed to the function and later stored is always "Telegram". The web import uses the actual detected origin. This means recurring expense matching (if added later) won't work because origin won't match.

**File:** `/src/lib/telegram/commands.ts` -- `handleDocumentMessage`

---

**13. `handleSummaryQuery` casts transaction to `Record<string, unknown>` for investment check**

```typescript
if ((t as Record<string, unknown>).investmentTransaction) continue
```

This is a type assertion workaround. The `include: { investmentTransaction: true }` should give proper typing. The cast suggests a type mismatch that should be fixed properly.

**File:** `/src/lib/telegram/queries.ts`

---

**14. Dead code: `callbackData` variable in `handleExpenseMessage`**

In the plan's Phase 4 implementation, a `callbackData` JSON.stringify is built but never used (the code uses `confirmData` with just the categoryId instead). The actual implementation in `commands.ts` seems to have removed this, but the plan doc still shows it.

---

**15. Settings page: Telegram link status does not auto-refresh after linking**

After clicking the deep link and completing linking in Telegram, the Settings page still shows "Conta nao vinculada" until manually refreshed. There's no polling or WebSocket to detect when linking completes.

---

### NIT

**16. Test file placement inconsistency**

`link-api.test.ts` is placed in `src/lib/telegram/` but tests an API route at `src/app/api/telegram/link/route.ts`. Per project convention, API integration tests go in `tests/integration/`. The parser and command tests being co-located in `src/lib/telegram/` is fine since they test library code.

---

**17. `downloadFile` doesn't check response status**

In `client.ts`, `downloadFile` calls `res.text()` without checking `res.ok`. If the file download fails (e.g., file expired, Telegram 400), it will return an HTML error page as the CSV content, which `parseCSV` will then fail to parse.

---

**18. `pending!.origin` -- unnecessary non-null assertion**

In `handleCsvConfirm`, `pending!.origin` uses a non-null assertion, but `pending` is already verified as non-null by the guard at the top of the function.

---

### Summary

The overall architecture is solid -- good separation between client, bot router, commands, and queries. The webhook security model (secret token + middleware exception) is correct in principle. The main concerns are:

1. **Security:** Missing userId validation in `handleCsvConfirm` and `handleSetCategory`, timing-unsafe secret comparison
2. **Feature parity:** Bot CSV import lacks `importBatchId`, recurring matching, and carryover detection -- consider extracting shared import logic
3. **Robustness:** Module-level env var evaluation, fragile message text parsing for expense confirmation, no response status checking on Telegram API calls
4. **Performance:** N+1 dedup queries for large imports

## Review do PR #12 вҖ” Telegram Bot Integration

### CRITICAL

**1. `handleCsvConfirm` nГЈo valida que o import pertence ao usuГЎrio solicitante**
Em `commands.ts`, o pending import Г© buscado apenas por `id`, sem checar `pending.userId === userId`. Um usuГЎrio que adivinhe o `importId` (cuid) pode confirmar o import de outro usuГЎrio.

**2. ComparaГ§ГЈo do webhook secret nГЈo Г© timing-safe**
Em `webhook/route.ts`, o secret Г© comparado com `!==`. VulnerГЎvel a timing attacks. Deve usar `crypto.timingSafeEqual`.

**3. Endpoint `/api/telegram/setup` sem exceГ§ГЈo no middleware**
SГі `/api/telegram/webhook` foi adicionado Г s exceГ§Гөes em `auth.config.ts`. O setup endpoint serГЎ redirecionado para login quando chamado via curl sem session cookie.

---

### IMPORTANT

**4. `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` avaliado em tempo de carregamento do mГіdulo**
`client.ts` linha 1 constrГіi a URL com `process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` no top-level. Se o mГіdulo for importado durante build, o token serГЎ `undefined`. Usar getter/lazy init.

**5. `handleConfirmExpense` parseia dados da transaГ§ГЈo do texto da mensagem**
FrГЎgil вҖ” depende do formato exato de `formatCurrency`. Se mudar separador ou espaГ§o, o regex quebra silenciosamente e produz `NaN`. Melhor armazenar os dados no banco (como `TelegramPendingImport`) ou no `callback_data`.

**6. `handleSetCategory` nГЈo valida que a categoria pertence ao usuГЎrio**
`prisma.category.findUnique({ where: { id: categoryId } })` busca qualquer categoria por ID sem filtrar por `userId`.

**7. Import via bot sem paridade com import web**
O import via bot pula: `importBatchId`, matching de despesas recorrentes, detecГ§ГЈo de carryover. Imports pelo bot nГЈo podem ser desfeitos em batch. Recomendo extrair a lГіgica de import para uma funГ§ГЈo compartilhada.

**8. N+1 queries na deduplicaГ§ГЈo**
`findDuplicate` Г© chamado individualmente por transaГ§ГЈo dentro de um loop. Para um CSV com 200 linhas = 200 queries. Fazer batch fetch por range de datas.

---

### MINOR

**9. `downloadFile` nГЈo checa `res.ok`** вҖ” se o download falhar, retorna HTML de erro como conteГәdo CSV.

**10. Origin hardcoded como "Telegram"** вҖ” o CSV pode ser de C6/ItaГә/BTG, mas o origin Г© sempre "Telegram". IncompatГӯvel com matching de recorrentes.

**11. `/desvincular` sem confirmaГ§ГЈo** вҖ” deleta o link imediatamente, sem pedir confirmaГ§ГЈo ao usuГЎrio.

**12. `filterDuplicates` exportada mas nunca usada** em `dedup.ts`.

**13. `link-api.test.ts` deveria estar em `tests/integration/`** вҖ” testa uma API route, nГЈo cГіdigo de lib.

---

### Veredicto

A arquitetura geral Г© boa вҖ” separaГ§ГЈo clara entre client, bot router, commands e queries. Os pontos crГӯticos sГЈo:
- **SeguranГ§a:** falta validaГ§ГЈo de `userId` em `handleCsvConfirm` e `handleSetCategory`, comparaГ§ГЈo de secret nГЈo timing-safe
- **Paridade de features:** import via bot diverge significativamente do web
- **Robustez:** env var avaliada em build time, parsing frГЎgil do texto da mensagem

Recomendo corrigir os 3 crГӯticos antes do merge.

Read the full PR diff saved at /Users/victor/.REDACTED.txt and do a thorough code review.

This is a PR that adds Telegram bot integration to a Next.js personal finance app (MyPocket). It includes:
- Deduplication module
- Telegram bot core (API client, update router, message parser, command handlers)
- Webhook endpoint
- Account linking flow
- Expense registration via text
- CSV import via bot
- Query commands
- Settings UI for link/unlink

Review for:
1. **Security issues** - especially around the webhook, auth, token handling, account linking
2. **Code quality** - patterns, error handling, edge cases
3. **Architecture** - separation of concerns, reusability
4. **Bugs or logic errors**
5. **Test coverage gaps**
6. **Performance concerns**

     7вҶ’+# Bot Telegram MyPocket вҖ” Plano de ImplementaГ§ГЈo
     8вҶ’+
     9вҶ’+## Overview
    10вҶ’+
    11вҶ’+Integrar um bot Telegram ao MyPocket para registrar despesas, importar faturas CSV e consultar orГ§amentos/gastos via chat. Inclui deduplicaГ§ГЈo centralizada para evitar transaГ§Гөes duplicadas tanto no bot quanto no app web.
    12вҶ’+
    13вҶ’+## Current State Analysis
    14вҶ’+
    15вҶ’+- **Sem deduplicaГ§ГЈo:** importar o mesmo CSV duas vezes cria duplicatas (`src/app/api/import/route.ts:166-186` cria transaГ§Гөes incondicionalmente)
    16вҶ’+- **Sem integraГ§ГЈo Telegram:** nenhum modelo, endpoint ou lГіgica de bot existe
    17вҶ’+- **Settings extensГӯvel:** pГЎgina de settings (`src/app/settings/page.tsx:528-554`) usa tabs Radix вҖ” nova aba Г© direta
    18вҶ’+- **Middleware restritivo:** `src/auth.config.ts:11-28` bloqueia todas as rotas nГЈo-auth вҖ” webhook precisa de exceГ§ГЈo
    19вҶ’+- **Summary endpoint reutilizГЎvel:** `GET /api/summary` retorna totais, breakdown por categoria e alertas de orГ§amento вҖ” ideal para consultas do bot
    20вҶ’+- **Categorizer reutilizГЎvel:** `src/lib/categorizer.ts:95-109` faz auto-categorizaГ§ГЈo por keywords вҖ” bot pode usar diretamente
    21вҶ’+- **CSV parser reutilizГЎvel:** `src/lib/csv-parser.ts:151` detecta banco e parseia вҖ” bot pode chamar diretamente
    22вҶ’+
    23вҶ’+## Desired End State
    24вҶ’+
    25вҶ’+1. MГіdulo de deduplicaГ§ГЈo centralizado previne transaГ§Гөes duplicatas em toda a aplicaГ§ГЈo
    26вҶ’+2. Bot Telegram funcional com: vinculaГ§ГЈo por deep link, registro de despesas via texto, importaГ§ГЈo CSV, consultas de resumo/categorias/transaГ§Гөes
    27вҶ’+3. Nova aba "Telegram" na pГЎgina de settings com botГЈo de vincular/desvincular
    28вҶ’+4. Webhook seguro integrado ao Next.js sem dependГӘncias externas pesadas
    29вҶ’+
    30вҶ’+**VerificaГ§ГЈo:** Enviar mensagem de texto com dados de transaГ§ГЈo no Telegram вҶ’ transaГ§ГЈo aparece no dashboard web. Importar mesmo CSV via bot e via web вҶ’ sem duplicatas.
    31вҶ’+

    34вҶ’+- Interface de IA/NLP вҖ” apenas comandos e formatos estruturados

    37вҶ’+- OCR de prints/fotos via bot (apenas texto e CSV)
    38вҶ’+- PaginaГ§ГЈo server-side no endpoint de transaГ§Гөes existente
    39вҶ’+

    52вҶ’+
    53вҶ’+**Scope Warning:** Este plano cobre o bot Telegram, dedup, e a aba de settings. NГЈo assume comportamento de investments, recurring expenses, ou OCR.

   300вҶ’+#### 2. Create deduplication module with tests
   301вҶ’+
   302вҶ’+- [x] **COMPLETE**
   303вҶ’+  - **Learning:** Mock de Prisma funciona bem com `vi.mocked()` para type-safe assertions. `mode: "insensitive"` funciona com PostgreSQL; em testes unitГЎrios o mock abstrai isso.
   304вҶ’+
   305вҶ’+**File**: `src/lib/dedup.ts` (CREATE) + `src/lib/dedup.test.ts` (CREATE)
   306вҶ’+**Complexity**: High
   307вҶ’+**TDD**: YES
   308вҶ’+**Depends On**: Task 1 (Prisma schema must have Transaction model)
   309вҶ’+
   310вҶ’+**Load Before Implementing**:
   311вҶ’+1. `prisma/schema.prisma` (lines 100-137) - Transaction model fields
   312вҶ’+2. `src/lib/db.ts` (full file) - Prisma client singleton import
   313вҶ’+3. `src/lib/categorizer.ts` (lines 1-10) - Import pattern example
   314вҶ’+
   315вҶ’+**Pre-conditions**:
   316вҶ’+- [ ] Task 1 completed (schema generated)
   317вҶ’+- [ ] Transaction model has `description`, `amount`, `date`, `userId`, `deletedAt` fields
   318вҶ’+
   319вҶ’+**Why**: LГіgica centralizada para detectar transaГ§Гөes duplicatas. Usada pelo import web, pelo bot (registro avulso), e pela importaГ§ГЈo CSV via bot.
   320вҶ’+
   321вҶ’+**Acceptance Criteria**:
   322вҶ’+```gherkin
   323вҶ’+Given a transaction exists with description "PIX REST FULANO", amount -45.90, date 2026-03-05
   324вҶ’+When findDuplicate is called with same description (case-insensitive), same amount, same date
   325вҶ’+Then it returns the existing transaction
   326вҶ’+
   327вҶ’+Given a transaction exists with description "PIX REST FULANO", amount -45.90, date 2026-03-05
   328вҶ’+When findDuplicate is called with different description "UBER TRIP"
   329вҶ’+Then it returns null
   330вҶ’+
   331вҶ’+Given a transaction exists but is soft-deleted (deletedAt is set)
   332вҶ’+When findDuplicate is called with matching description, amount, date
   333вҶ’+Then it returns null (ignores deleted transactions)
   334вҶ’+
   335вҶ’+Given a transaction with description "PIX REST FULANO", amount -45.90, date 2026-03-05T15:30:00
   336вҶ’+When findDuplicate is called with same description, same amount, date 2026-03-05T08:00:00
   337вҶ’+Then it returns the existing transaction (same day, different time)
   338вҶ’+```
   339вҶ’+
   340вҶ’+**Implementation**:
   341вҶ’+
   342вҶ’+`src/lib/dedup.ts`:
   343вҶ’+```typescript
   344вҶ’+import prisma from "@/lib/db"
   345вҶ’+
   346вҶ’+export interface DuplicateCheckParams {
   347вҶ’+  userId: string
   348вҶ’+  description: string
   349вҶ’+  amount: number
   350вҶ’+  date: Date
   351вҶ’+}
   352вҶ’+
   353вҶ’+export async function findDuplicate({
   354вҶ’+  userId,
   355вҶ’+  description,
   356вҶ’+  amount,
   357вҶ’+  date,
   358вҶ’+}: DuplicateCheckParams) {
   359вҶ’+  // Normalize date to start/end of day
   360вҶ’+  const dayStart = new Date(date)
   361вҶ’+  dayStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
   362вҶ’+  const dayEnd = new Date(date)
   363вҶ’+  dayEnd.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999)
   364вҶ’+
   365вҶ’+  const duplicate = await prisma.transaction.findFirst({
   366вҶ’+    where: {
   367вҶ’+      userId,
   368вҶ’+      description: {
   369вҶ’+        equals: description.trim(),
   370вҶ’+        mode: "insensitive",
   371вҶ’+      },
   372вҶ’+      amount,
   373вҶ’+      date: {
   374вҶ’+        gte: dayStart,
   375вҶ’+        lte: dayEnd,
   376вҶ’+      },
   377вҶ’+      deletedAt: null,
   378вҶ’+    },
   379вҶ’+  })
   380вҶ’+
   381вҶ’+  return duplicate
   382вҶ’+}
   383вҶ’+
   384вҶ’+export async function filterDuplicates(
   385вҶ’+  userId: string,
   386вҶ’+  transactions: Array<{ description: string; amount: number; date: Date }>
   387вҶ’+): Promise<{ unique: typeof transactions; duplicateCount: number }> {
   388вҶ’+  const unique: typeof transactions = []
   389вҶ’+  let duplicateCount = 0
   390вҶ’+
   391вҶ’+  for (const t of transactions) {
   392вҶ’+    const dup = await findDuplicate({
   393вҶ’+      userId,
   394вҶ’+      description: t.description,
   395вҶ’+      amount: t.amount,
   396вҶ’+      date: t.date,
   397вҶ’+    })
   398вҶ’+    if (dup) {
   399вҶ’+      duplicateCount++
   400вҶ’+    } else {
   401вҶ’+      unique.push(t)
   402вҶ’+    }
   403вҶ’+  }
   404вҶ’+
   405вҶ’+  return { unique, duplicateCount }
   406вҶ’+}
   407вҶ’+```

   846вҶ’+`src/lib/telegram/bot.ts`:
   847вҶ’+```typescript
   848вҶ’+import prisma from "@/lib/db"
   849вҶ’+import { sendMessage, type TelegramUpdate } from "./client"
   850вҶ’+
   851вҶ’+export async function handleUpdate(update: TelegramUpdate) {
   852вҶ’+  const chatId =
   853вҶ’+    update.message?.chat.id ??
   854вҶ’+    update.callback_query?.message?.chat.id
   855вҶ’+
   856вҶ’+  if (!chatId) return
   857вҶ’+
   858вҶ’+  // Look up linked user
   859вҶ’+  const link = await prisma.telegramLink.findUnique({
   860вҶ’+    where: { chatId: String(chatId) },
   861вҶ’+  })
   862вҶ’+
   863вҶ’+  // Handle /start command (linking) вҖ” always allowed, even without link
   864вҶ’+  if (update.message?.text?.startsWith("/start")) {
   865вҶ’+    const { handleStartCommand } = await import("./commands")
   866вҶ’+    return handleStartCommand(update.message, link?.userId ?? null)
   867вҶ’+  }
   868вҶ’+
   869вҶ’+  // All other commands require a linked account
   870вҶ’+  if (!link) {
   871вҶ’+    return sendMessage(
   872вҶ’+      chatId,
   873вҶ’+      "Conta nГЈo vinculada. Acesse as configuraГ§Гөes do MyPocket para vincular sua conta."
   874вҶ’+    )
   875вҶ’+  }
   876вҶ’+
   877вҶ’+  const userId = link.userId
   878вҶ’+
   879вҶ’+  // Route callback queries (inline keyboard buttons)
   880вҶ’+  if (update.callback_query) {
   881вҶ’+    const { handleCallbackQuery } = await import("./commands")
   882вҶ’+    return handleCallbackQuery(update.callback_query, userId)
   883вҶ’+  }
   884вҶ’+
   885вҶ’+  // Route text messages
   886вҶ’+  if (update.message?.text) {
   887вҶ’+    const text = update.message.text
   888вҶ’+
   889вҶ’+    if (text === "/menu") {
   890вҶ’+      const { handleMenuCommand } = await import("./commands")
   891вҶ’+      return handleMenuCommand(chatId, userId)
   892вҶ’+    }
   893вҶ’+
   894вҶ’+    if (text === "/desvincular") {
   895вҶ’+      const { handleUnlinkCommand } = await import("./commands")
   896вҶ’+      return handleUnlinkCommand(chatId, userId)
   897вҶ’+    }
   898вҶ’+
   899вҶ’+    // Default: try to parse as expense
   900вҶ’+    const { handleExpenseMessage } = await import("./commands")
   901вҶ’+    return handleExpenseMessage(update.message, userId)
   902вҶ’+  }
   903вҶ’+
   904вҶ’+  // Route document messages (CSV files)
   905вҶ’+  if (update.message?.document) {
   906вҶ’+    const { handleDocumentMessage } = await import("./commands")
   907вҶ’+    return handleDocumentMessage(update.message, userId)
   908вҶ’+  }
   909вҶ’+}
   910вҶ’+```

   939вҶ’+**Why**: O webhook Г© o ponto de entrada para todas as mensagens do Telegram. A exceГ§ГЈo no middleware garante que requests do Telegram nГЈo sГЈo bloqueados pela autenticaГ§ГЈo JWT.

  1162вҶ’+# Phase 3: VinculaГ§ГЈo via Deep Link
  1163вҶ’+
  1164вҶ’+## Overview
  1165вҶ’+
  1166вҶ’+Implementar o fluxo completo de vinculaГ§ГЈo de conta: API de geraГ§ГЈo de token, comando `/start TOKEN` no bot, e nova aba "Telegram" na pГЎgina de Settings com botГЈo de vincular/desvincular. ApГіs esta fase, um usuГЎrio pode vincular sua conta MyPocket ao Telegram.
  1167вҶ’+
  1168вҶ’+## Reference Docs for This Phase
  1169вҶ’+- `prisma/schema.prisma` - TelegramLink e TelegramLinkToken models (criados na Phase 1)
  1170вҶ’+- `src/lib/telegram/bot.ts` - Handler principal com roteamento (criado na Phase 2)
  1171вҶ’+- `src/lib/telegram/commands.ts` - Stubs a substituir (criado na Phase 2)
  1172вҶ’+- `src/app/settings/page.tsx` (lines 528-554) - TabsList para adicionar nova aba
  1173вҶ’+- `src/app/api/settings/route.ts` - PadrГЈo de API com auth
  1174вҶ’+- `src/lib/auth-utils.ts` - getAuthenticatedUserId pattern
  1175вҶ’+
  1176вҶ’+## Changes Required
  1177вҶ’+
  1178вҶ’+#### 1. Create link token API endpoint - [x] DONE
  1179вҶ’+
  1180вҶ’+**File**: `src/app/api/telegram/link/route.ts` (CREATE)
  1181вҶ’+**Complexity**: High
  1182вҶ’+**TDD**: YES
  1183вҶ’+**Depends On**: Phase 1 Task 1 (TelegramLinkToken model must exist)
  1184вҶ’+
  1185вҶ’+**Load Before Implementing**:
  1186вҶ’+1. `prisma/schema.prisma` (TelegramLink and TelegramLinkToken models)
  1187вҶ’+2. `src/lib/auth-utils.ts` (full file) - Auth pattern
  1188вҶ’+3. `src/app/api/settings/route.ts` (full file) - API route pattern to follow
  1189вҶ’+
  1190вҶ’+**Pre-conditions**:
  1191вҶ’+- [ ] TelegramLinkToken model exists in Prisma schema
  1192вҶ’+- [ ] TelegramLink model exists in Prisma schema
  1193вҶ’+- [ ] `npm run db:generate` has been run after Phase 1
  1194вҶ’+
  1195вҶ’+**Why**: Gera tokens temporГЎrios para vinculaГ§ГЈo via deep link. TambГ©m provГӘ GET para status de vinculaГ§ГЈo e DELETE para desvinculaГ§ГЈo.
  1196вҶ’+
  1197вҶ’+**Acceptance Criteria**:
  1198вҶ’+```gherkin
  1199вҶ’+Given an authenticated user without a Telegram link
  1200вҶ’+When POST /api/telegram/link is called
  1201вҶ’+Then a new TelegramLinkToken is created with 10-minute expiry
  1202вҶ’+And the response contains the token and deep link URL
  1203вҶ’+
  1204вҶ’+Given an authenticated user with an existing Telegram link
  1205вҶ’+When GET /api/telegram/link is called
  1206вҶ’+Then the response contains linked: true and chatId
  1207вҶ’+
  1208вҶ’+Given an authenticated user with an existing Telegram link
  1209вҶ’+When DELETE /api/telegram/link is called
  1210вҶ’+Then the TelegramLink is deleted
  1211вҶ’+And linked: false is returned
  1212вҶ’+
  1213вҶ’+Given an authenticated user
  1214вҶ’+When POST /api/telegram/link is called
  1215вҶ’+Then any existing tokens for this user are deleted first (cleanup)
  1216вҶ’+```
  1217вҶ’+
  1218вҶ’+**Implementation**:
  1219вҶ’+
  1220вҶ’+```typescript
  1221вҶ’+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
  1222вҶ’+import prisma from "@/lib/db"
  1223вҶ’+import { getAuthenticatedUserId, unauthorizedResponse } from "@/lib/auth-utils"
  1224вҶ’+import { randomUUID } from "crypto"
  1225вҶ’+
  1226вҶ’+const BOT_USERNAME = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_USERNAME || "mypocket_bot"
  1227вҶ’+
  1228вҶ’+// GET - Check link status
  1229вҶ’+export async function GET() {
  1230вҶ’+  try {
  1231вҶ’+    const userId = await getAuthenticatedUserId()
  1232вҶ’+
  1233вҶ’+    const link = await prisma.telegramLink.findUnique({
  1234вҶ’+      where: { userId },
  1235вҶ’+    })
  1236вҶ’+
  1237вҶ’+    if (link) {
  1238вҶ’+      return NextResponse.json({
  1239вҶ’+        linked: true,
  1240вҶ’+        chatId: link.chatId,
  1241вҶ’+        linkedAt: link.linkedAt,
  1242вҶ’+      })
  1243вҶ’+    }
  1244вҶ’+
  1245вҶ’+    return NextResponse.json({ linked: false })
  1246вҶ’+  } catch (error) {
  1247вҶ’+    if (error instanceof Error && error.message === "Unauthorized") {
  1248вҶ’+      return unauthorizedResponse()
  1249вҶ’+    }
  1250вҶ’+    return NextResponse.json(
  1251вҶ’+      { error: "Erro ao verificar vinculaГ§ГЈo" },
  1252вҶ’+      { status: 500 }
  1253вҶ’+    )
  1254вҶ’+  }
  1255вҶ’+}
  1256вҶ’+
  1257вҶ’+// POST - Generate link token
  1258вҶ’+export async function POST() {
  1259вҶ’+  try {
  1260вҶ’+    const userId = await getAuthenticatedUserId()
  1261вҶ’+
  1262вҶ’+    // Check if already linked
  1263вҶ’+    const existingLink = await prisma.telegramLink.findUnique({
  1264вҶ’+      where: { userId },
  1265вҶ’+    })
  1266вҶ’+    if (existingLink) {
  1267вҶ’+      return NextResponse.json(
  1268вҶ’+        { error: "Conta jГЎ vinculada ao Telegram" },
  1269вҶ’+        { status: 400 }
  1270вҶ’+      )
  1271вҶ’+    }
  1272вҶ’+
  1273вҶ’+    // Delete any existing tokens for this user
  1274вҶ’+    await prisma.telegramLinkToken.deleteMany({
  1275вҶ’+      where: { userId },
  1276вҶ’+    })
  1277вҶ’+
  1278вҶ’+    // Create new token
  1279вҶ’+    const token = randomUUID()
  1280вҶ’+    const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 10 * 60 * 1000) // 10 minutes
  1281вҶ’+
  1282вҶ’+    await prisma.telegramLinkToken.create({
  1283вҶ’+      data: {
  1284вҶ’+        token,
  1285вҶ’+        userId,
  1286вҶ’+        expiresAt,
  1287вҶ’+      },
  1288вҶ’+    })
  1289вҶ’+
  1290вҶ’+    const deepLink = `https://t.me/${BOT_USERNAME}?start=${token}`
  1291вҶ’+
  1292вҶ’+    return NextResponse.json({
  1293вҶ’+      token,
  1294вҶ’+      deepLink,
  1295вҶ’+      expiresAt,
  1296вҶ’+    })
  1297вҶ’+  } catch (error) {
  1298вҶ’+    if (error instanceof Error && error.message === "Unauthorized") {
  1299вҶ’+      return unauthorizedResponse()
  1300вҶ’+    }
  1301вҶ’+    return NextResponse.json(
  1302вҶ’+      { error: "Erro ao gerar link de vinculaГ§ГЈo" },
  1303вҶ’+      { status: 500 }
  1304вҶ’+    )
  1305вҶ’+  }
  1306вҶ’+}
  1307вҶ’+
  1308вҶ’+// DELETE - Unlink Telegram
  1309вҶ’+export async function DELETE() {
  1310вҶ’+  try {
  1311вҶ’+    const userId = await getAuthenticatedUserId()
  1312вҶ’+
  1313вҶ’+    await prisma.telegramLink.deleteMany({
  1314вҶ’+      where: { userId },
  1315вҶ’+    })
  1316вҶ’+
  1317вҶ’+    return NextResponse.json({ linked: false })
  1318вҶ’+  } catch (error) {
  1319вҶ’+    if (error instanceof Error && error.message === "Unauthorized") {
  1320вҶ’+      return unauthorizedResponse()
  1321вҶ’+    }
  1322вҶ’+    return NextResponse.json(
  1323вҶ’+      { error: "Erro ao desvincular" },
  1324вҶ’+      { status: 500 }
  1325вҶ’+    )
  1326вҶ’+  }
  1327вҶ’+}
  1328вҶ’+```
  1329вҶ’+
  1330вҶ’+**Verification**: `npm run build`
  1331вҶ’+
  1332вҶ’+**On Failure**:
  1333вҶ’+- If `randomUUID` not available: Use `crypto.randomUUID()` or `import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid'`
  1334вҶ’+- If Prisma model not found: Run `npm run db:generate`
  1335вҶ’+
  1336вҶ’+**Learning:** O mock do mГіdulo `crypto` nativo no Vitest requer `importOriginal` para preservar o export default. Optei por testar a estrutura da resposta (token presente, deepLink contГ©m o token) em vez de mockar `randomUUID`, abordagem mais robusta e menos frГЎgil.

  1356вҶ’+**Why**: Implementa o fluxo de vinculaГ§ГЈo: `/start TOKEN` valida o token, cria o link, e responde com sucesso. `/desvincular` remove o link.
  1357вҶ’+
  1358вҶ’+**Acceptance Criteria**:
  1359вҶ’+```gherkin

  1366вҶ’+Given a user sends /start with an expired token
  1367вҶ’+When handleStartCommand is called

  1370вҶ’+
  1371вҶ’+Given a user sends /start without a token

  1375вҶ’+Given a linked user sends /desvincular

  1383вҶ’+Replace `handleStartCommand` and `handleUnlinkCommand` in `commands.ts`:
  1384вҶ’+
  1385вҶ’+```typescript
  1386вҶ’+import prisma from "@/lib/db"

  1393вҶ’+export async function handleStartCommand(

  1422вҶ’+
  1423вҶ’+  if (linkToken.expiresAt < new Date()) {

  1432вҶ’+  if (existingChatLink) {

  1438вҶ’+
  1439вҶ’+  // Create link and delete token

  1449вҶ’+    ])

  1451вҶ’+    return sendMessage(
  1452вҶ’+      chatId,
  1453вҶ’+      "Conta vinculada com sucesso! рҹҺү\n\nEnvie /menu para ver as opГ§Гөes disponГӯveis."
  1454вҶ’+    )
  1455вҶ’+  } catch (error) {

  2083вҶ’+
  2084вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("csv_cancel:")) {
  2085вҶ’+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "ImportaГ§ГЈo cancelada.")
  2086вҶ’+  }
  2087вҶ’+}
  2088вҶ’+
  2089вҶ’+async function handleConfirmExpense(
  2090вҶ’+  chatId: number,
  2091вҶ’+  messageId: number,
  2092вҶ’+  userId: string,
  2093вҶ’+  message: TelegramMessage
  2094вҶ’+) {
  2095вҶ’+  // Parse expense data from the confirmation message text
  2096вҶ’+  const text = message.text || ""
  2097вҶ’+  const lines = text.split("\n")
  2098вҶ’+
  2099вҶ’+  const descLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ“қ"))
  2100вҶ’+  const amountLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ’°"))
  2101вҶ’+  const dateLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ“…"))
  2102вҶ’+  const catLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹҸ·пёҸ"))
  2103вҶ’+
  2104вҶ’+  if (!descLine || !amountLine || !dateLine) {
  2105вҶ’+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Erro: dados da transaГ§ГЈo nГЈo encontrados.")
  2106вҶ’+  }
  2107вҶ’+
  2108вҶ’+  const description = descLine.replace("рҹ“қ ", "")
  2109вҶ’+  const amountStr = amountLine.replace("рҹ’° ", "").replace("R$", "").replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", ".").trim()
  2110вҶ’+  const amount = parseFloat(amountStr)
  2111вҶ’+  const dateParts = dateLine.replace("рҹ“… ", "").split("/")
  2112вҶ’+  const date = new Date(
  2113вҶ’+    parseInt(dateParts[2]),
  2114вҶ’+    parseInt(dateParts[1]) - 1,
  2115вҶ’+    parseInt(dateParts[0]),
  2116вҶ’+    12, 0, 0
  2117вҶ’+  )
  2118вҶ’+
  2119вҶ’+  // Get categoryId from the current keyboard data
  2120вҶ’+  const categoryName = catLine?.replace("рҹҸ·пёҸ ", "") || "Sem categoria"
  2121вҶ’+
  2122вҶ’+  // Find category by name
  2123вҶ’+  const category = categoryName !== "Sem categoria"
  2124вҶ’+    ? await prisma.category.findFirst({
  2125вҶ’+        where: { name: categoryName, userId },
  2126вҶ’+      })
  2127вҶ’+    : null
  2128вҶ’+
  2129вҶ’+  // Check for duplicate
  2130вҶ’+  const duplicate = await findDuplicate({
  2131вҶ’+    userId,
  2132вҶ’+    description,
  2133вҶ’+    amount: -Math.abs(amount),
  2134вҶ’+    date,
  2135вҶ’+  })
  2136вҶ’+
  2137вҶ’+  if (duplicate) {
  2138вҶ’+    return editMessageText(
  2139вҶ’+      chatId,
  2140вҶ’+      messageId,
  2141вҶ’+      `вҡ пёҸ TransaГ§ГЈo duplicata detectada!\n\nрҹ“қ ${description}\nрҹ’° ${formatCurrency(amount)}\nрҹ“… ${dateLine.replace("рҹ“… ", "")}\n\nEsta transaГ§ГЈo jГЎ existe no sistema.`
  2142вҶ’+    )
  2143вҶ’+  }
  2144вҶ’+
  2145вҶ’+  // Create transaction
  2146вҶ’+  await prisma.transaction.create({
  2147вҶ’+    data: {
  2148вҶ’+      userId,
  2149вҶ’+      description,
  2150вҶ’+      amount: -Math.abs(amount),
  2151вҶ’+      date,
  2152вҶ’+      type: "EXPENSE",
  2153вҶ’+      origin: "Telegram",
  2154вҶ’+      categoryId: category?.id || null,
  2155вҶ’+      isFixed: false,
  2156вҶ’+      isInstallment: false,
  2157вҶ’+    },
  2158вҶ’+  })
  2159вҶ’+
  2160вҶ’+  return editMessageText(
  2161вҶ’+    chatId,
  2162вҶ’+    messageId,
  2163вҶ’+    `вң… Despesa registrada!\n\nрҹ“қ ${description}\nрҹ’° ${formatCurrency(amount)}\nрҹ“… ${dateLine.replace("рҹ“… ", "")}\nрҹҸ·пёҸ ${categoryName}`
  2164вҶ’+  )
  2165вҶ’+}

  2167вҶ’+async function handleShowCategories(
  2168вҶ’+  chatId: number,
  2169вҶ’+  messageId: number,
  2170вҶ’+  userId: string
  2171вҶ’+) {
  2172вҶ’+  const categories = await prisma.category.findMany({
  2173вҶ’+    where: { userId },
  2174вҶ’+    orderBy: { name: "asc" },
  2175вҶ’+  })
  2176вҶ’+
  2177вҶ’+  if (categories.length === 0) {
  2178вҶ’+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Nenhuma categoria cadastrada.")
  2179вҶ’+  }
  2180вҶ’+
  2181вҶ’+  // Build keyboard with categories (max 2 per row)
  2182вҶ’+  const keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][] = []
  2183вҶ’+  for (let i = 0; i < categories.length; i += 2) {
  2184вҶ’+    const row: InlineKeyboardButton[] = [
  2185вҶ’+      { text: categories[i].name, callback_data: `set_cat:${categories[i].id}` },
  2186вҶ’+    ]
  2187вҶ’+    if (i + 1 < categories.length) {
  2188вҶ’+      row.push({
  2189вҶ’+        text: categories[i + 1].name,
  2190вҶ’+        callback_data: `set_cat:${categories[i + 1].id}`,
  2191вҶ’+      })
  2192вҶ’+    }
  2193вҶ’+    keyboard.push(row)
  2194вҶ’+  }
  2195вҶ’+
  2196вҶ’+  keyboard.push([{ text: "вқҢ Cancelar", callback_data: "cancel:0" }])
  2197вҶ’+
  2198вҶ’+  return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Selecione a categoria:", {
  2199вҶ’+    reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard },
  2200вҶ’+  })
  2201вҶ’+}

  2203вҶ’+async function handleSetCategory(
  2204вҶ’+  chatId: number,

  2206вҶ’+  categoryId: string
  2207вҶ’+) {

  2211вҶ’+
  2212вҶ’+  if (!category) {
  2213вҶ’+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Categoria nГЈo encontrada.")

  2216вҶ’+  // We need to rebuild the confirmation message with the new category
  2217вҶ’+  // Since we can't access the original parsed data, we ask the user to send the message again
  2218вҶ’+  // This is a simplified approach вҖ” the full message is reconstructed from the edit
  2219вҶ’+  return editMessageText(

  2223вҶ’+  )
  2224вҶ’+}
  2225вҶ’+```

  2356вҶ’+# Phase 5: CSV Import + Consultas
  2357вҶ’+
  2358вҶ’+## Overview
  2359вҶ’+
  2360вҶ’+Implementar importaГ§ГЈo de arquivos CSV via bot (download, parse, dedup, criaГ§ГЈo) e os trГӘs comandos de consulta (resumo do mГӘs, gastos por categoria, Гәltimas transaГ§Гөes) com menu via inline keyboard. Esta fase completa todas as funcionalidades do bot.
  2361вҶ’+
  2362вҶ’+## Reference Docs for This Phase
  2363вҶ’+- `src/lib/telegram/commands.ts` - Stubs handleDocumentMessage e handleMenuCommand a substituir
  2364вҶ’+- `src/lib/telegram/client.ts` - getFile, downloadFile, sendMessage, editMessageText
  2365вҶ’+- `src/lib/csv-parser.ts` (lines 151-211) - parseCSV function
  2366вҶ’+- `src/lib/dedup.ts` - findDuplicate, filterDuplicates
  2367вҶ’+- `src/app/api/summary/route.ts` (lines 1-155) - Summary queries para reutilizar
  2368вҶ’+- `src/app/api/import/route.ts` (lines 80-187) - Import loop para replicar
  2369вҶ’+- `src/app/api/transactions/route.ts` (lines 5-115) - Transaction query pattern
  2370вҶ’+- `src/lib/utils.ts` - formatCurrency
  2371вҶ’+
  2372вҶ’+## Changes Required
  2373вҶ’+
  2374вҶ’+#### 1. Implement CSV file import via bot -- DONE
  2375вҶ’+
  2376вҶ’+**File**: `src/lib/telegram/commands.ts` (MODIFY)
  2377вҶ’+**Complexity**: High
  2378вҶ’+**TDD**: NO вҖ” integrates Telegram File API + existing parseCSV + database writes
  2379вҶ’+**Depends On**: Phase 4 (commands.ts with callback query handler), Phase 1 (dedup module)
  2380вҶ’+- **Learning:** Consolidei os imports de `./client` em um Гәnico bloco para evitar imports duplicados. O `parseCSV` retorna `ImportedTransaction[]` com `amount` jГЎ negativo (credit card expenses), entГЈo o dedup precisa considerar isso ao verificar duplicatas.
  2381вҶ’+
  2382вҶ’+**Load Before Implementing**:
  2383вҶ’+1. `src/lib/telegram/commands.ts` (full file) - Current state after Phase 4
  2384вҶ’+2. `src/lib/telegram/client.ts` (full file) - getFile, downloadFile functions
  2385вҶ’+3. `src/lib/csv-parser.ts` (lines 151-242) - parseCSV function signature and return type
  2386вҶ’+4. `src/lib/dedup.ts` (full file) - findDuplicate function
  2387вҶ’+5. `src/app/api/import/route.ts` (lines 80-187) - Transaction creation pattern to replicate
  2388вҶ’+
  2389вҶ’+**Pre-conditions**:
  2390вҶ’+- [x] Phase 4 completed (commands.ts has working callback query handler)
  2391вҶ’+- [x] `src/lib/csv-parser.ts` exports `parseCSV(fileContent: string, origin: string)`
  2392вҶ’+- [x] `src/lib/dedup.ts` exports `findDuplicate`
  2393вҶ’+
  2394вҶ’+**Why**: Permite importar faturas CSV diretamente pelo Telegram. O bot baixa o arquivo, parseia, verifica duplicatas, e cria transaГ§Гөes вҖ” replicando o fluxo do app web.
  2395вҶ’+
  2396вҶ’+**Acceptance Criteria**:
  2397вҶ’+```gherkin
  2398вҶ’+Given a linked user sends a .csv file via Telegram
  2399вҶ’+When handleDocumentMessage is called
  2400вҶ’+Then the file is downloaded and parsed
  2401вҶ’+And a summary message shows count of transactions found and duplicates detected
  2402вҶ’+And inline keyboard offers [Importar] [Cancelar]
  2403вҶ’+
  2404вҶ’+Given the user clicks [Importar] after sending a CSV
  2405вҶ’+When handleCallbackQuery receives csv_confirm
  2406вҶ’+Then all non-duplicate transactions are created in the database
  2407вҶ’+And a success message shows imported count and skipped duplicates
  2408вҶ’+
  2409вҶ’+Given the user sends a non-CSV file
  2410вҶ’+When handleDocumentMessage is called
  2411вҶ’+Then an error message says only CSV files are supported
  2412вҶ’+```
  2413вҶ’+
  2414вҶ’+**Implementation**:
  2415вҶ’+
  2416вҶ’+Add import at top of commands.ts:
  2417вҶ’+```typescript
  2418вҶ’+import { parseCSV } from "@/lib/csv-parser"
  2419вҶ’+import { getFile, downloadFile } from "./client"
  2420вҶ’+```
  2421вҶ’+
  2422вҶ’+Replace `handleDocumentMessage`:
  2423вҶ’+```typescript
  2424вҶ’+// Pending imports are stored in database (TelegramPendingImport model)
  2425вҶ’+// to survive cold starts and work across multiple processes
  2426вҶ’+
  2427вҶ’+export async function handleDocumentMessage(
  2428вҶ’+  message: TelegramMessage,
  2429вҶ’+  userId: string
  2430вҶ’+) {
  2431вҶ’+  const chatId = message.chat.id
  2432вҶ’+  const doc = message.document
  2433вҶ’+
  2434вҶ’+  if (!doc) return
  2435вҶ’+
  2436вҶ’+  // Check file extension
  2437вҶ’+  const fileName = doc.file_name || ""
  2438вҶ’+  if (!fileName.toLowerCase().endsWith(".csv")) {
  2439вҶ’+    return sendMessage(chatId, "Apenas arquivos CSV sГЈo suportados.")
  2440вҶ’+  }
  2441вҶ’+
  2442вҶ’+  // Check file size (max 5MB to be safe)
  2443вҶ’+  if (doc.file_size && doc.file_size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
  2444вҶ’+    return sendMessage(chatId, "Arquivo muito grande. MГЎximo 5MB.")
  2445вҶ’+  }
  2446вҶ’+
  2447вҶ’+  try {
  2448вҶ’+    // Download file
  2449вҶ’+    const filePath = await getFile(doc.file_id)
  2450вҶ’+    if (!filePath) {
  2451вҶ’+      return sendMessage(chatId, "Erro ao acessar o arquivo.")
  2452вҶ’+    }
  2453вҶ’+
  2454вҶ’+    const content = await downloadFile(filePath)
  2455вҶ’+
  2456вҶ’+    // Parse CSV
  2457вҶ’+    const origin = "Telegram"
  2458вҶ’+    const parsed = await parseCSV(content, origin)
  2459вҶ’+
  2460вҶ’+    if (parsed.length === 0) {
  2461вҶ’+      return sendMessage(chatId, "Nenhuma transaГ§ГЈo encontrada no arquivo.")
  2462вҶ’+    }
  2463вҶ’+
  2464вҶ’+    // Check for duplicates
  2465вҶ’+    let duplicateCount = 0
  2466вҶ’+    const uniqueTransactions: typeof parsed = []
  2467вҶ’+
  2468вҶ’+    for (const t of parsed) {
  2469вҶ’+      const amount = t.type === "EXPENSE" ? -Math.abs(t.amount) : Math.abs(t.amount)
  2470вҶ’+      const dup = await findDuplicate({
  2471вҶ’+        userId,
  2472вҶ’+        description: t.description,
  2473вҶ’+        amount,
  2474вҶ’+        date: t.date,
  2475вҶ’+      })
  2476вҶ’+      if (dup) {
  2477вҶ’+        duplicateCount++
  2478вҶ’+      } else {
  2479вҶ’+        uniqueTransactions.push(t)
  2480вҶ’+      }
  2481вҶ’+    }
  2482вҶ’+
  2483вҶ’+    if (uniqueTransactions.length === 0) {
  2484вҶ’+      return sendMessage(
  2485вҶ’+        chatId,
  2486вҶ’+        `Todas as ${parsed.length} transaГ§Гөes jГЎ existem no sistema.`
  2487вҶ’+      )
  2488вҶ’+    }
  2489вҶ’+
  2490вҶ’+    // Store for confirmation in database
  2491вҶ’+    // Clean expired entries first
  2492вҶ’+    await prisma.telegramPendingImport.deleteMany({
  2493вҶ’+      where: { expiresAt: { lt: new Date() } },
  2494вҶ’+    })
  2495вҶ’+
  2496вҶ’+    const pendingImport = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.create({
  2497вҶ’+      data: {
  2498вҶ’+        userId,
  2499вҶ’+        chatId: String(chatId),

2500вҶ’+        payload: JSON.stringify(uniqueTransactions.map(t => ({
  2501вҶ’+          description: t.description,
  2502вҶ’+          amount: t.amount,
  2503вҶ’+          date: t.date,
  2504вҶ’+          categoryId: t.suggestedCategoryId || null,
  2505вҶ’+          isInstallment: t.isInstallment || false,
  2506вҶ’+          currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment || null,
  2507вҶ’+          totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments || null,
  2508вҶ’+          type: t.type || "EXPENSE",
  2509вҶ’+        }))),
  2510вҶ’+        origin,
  2511вҶ’+        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 10 * 60 * 1000),
  2512вҶ’+      },
  2513вҶ’+    })
  2514вҶ’+
  2515вҶ’+    const summaryLines = [
  2516вҶ’+      `рҹ“„ Arquivo: ${fileName}`,
  2517вҶ’+      `рҹ“Ҡ ${parsed.length} transaГ§Гөes encontradas`,
  2518вҶ’+    ]
  2519вҶ’+    if (duplicateCount > 0) {
  2520вҶ’+      summaryLines.push(`вҡ пёҸ ${duplicateCount} duplicatas ignoradas`)
  2521вҶ’+    }
  2522вҶ’+    summaryLines.push(`вң… ${uniqueTransactions.length} prontas para importar`)
  2523вҶ’+
  2524вҶ’+    return sendMessage(chatId, summaryLines.join("\n"), {
  2525вҶ’+      reply_markup: {
  2526вҶ’+        inline_keyboard: [
  2527вҶ’+          [
  2528вҶ’+            { text: "вң… Importar", callback_data: `csv_confirm:${pendingImport.id}` },
  2529вҶ’+            { text: "вқҢ Cancelar", callback_data: `csv_cancel:0` },
  2530вҶ’+          ],
  2531вҶ’+        ],
  2532вҶ’+      },
  2533вҶ’+    })
  2534вҶ’+  } catch (error) {
  2535вҶ’+    console.error("CSV import error:", error)
  2536вҶ’+    return sendMessage(
  2537вҶ’+      chatId,
  2538вҶ’+      "Erro ao processar o arquivo. Verifique se Г© um CSV vГЎlido (C6, ItaГә ou BTG)."
  2539вҶ’+    )
  2540вҶ’+  }

  2542вҶ’+
  2543вҶ’+export async function handleCsvConfirm(
  2544вҶ’+  chatId: number,
  2545вҶ’+  messageId: number,
  2546вҶ’+  userId: string,
  2547вҶ’+  importId: string
  2548вҶ’+) {
  2549вҶ’+  const pending = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.findUnique({
  2550вҶ’+    where: { id: importId },
  2551вҶ’+  })
  2552вҶ’+  if (!pending || pending.expiresAt < new Date()) {
  2553вҶ’+    if (pending) await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
  2554вҶ’+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "ImportaГ§ГЈo expirada. Envie o arquivo novamente.")
  2555вҶ’+  }
  2556вҶ’+
  2557вҶ’+  await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
  2558вҶ’+
  2559вҶ’+  const transactions = JSON.parse(pending.payload) as Array<{
  2560вҶ’+    description: string
  2561вҶ’+    amount: number
  2562вҶ’+    date: string | Date
  2563вҶ’+    categoryId: string | null
  2564вҶ’+    isInstallment: boolean
  2565вҶ’+    currentInstallment: number | null
  2566вҶ’+    totalInstallments: number | null
  2567вҶ’+    type: string
  2568вҶ’+  }>
  2569вҶ’+
  2570вҶ’+  let importedCount = 0
  2571вҶ’+  for (const t of transactions) {
  2572вҶ’+    const type = t.type || "EXPENSE"
  2573вҶ’+    let amount = t.amount
  2574вҶ’+    if (type === "EXPENSE" && amount > 0) amount = -amount
  2575вҶ’+    else if (type === "INCOME" && amount < 0) amount = Math.abs(amount)
  2576вҶ’+
  2577вҶ’+    const dateStr = typeof t.date === "string" && !(t.date as string).includes("T")
  2578вҶ’+      ? t.date + "T12:00:00"
  2579вҶ’+      : t.date
  2580вҶ’+    const transactionDate = new Date(dateStr)
  2581вҶ’+
  2582вҶ’+    await prisma.transaction.create({
  2583вҶ’+      data: {
  2584вҶ’+        userId,
  2585вҶ’+        description: t.description,
  2586вҶ’+        amount,
  2587вҶ’+        date: transactionDate,
  2588вҶ’+        type,
  2589вҶ’+        origin: pending!.origin,
  2590вҶ’+        categoryId: t.categoryId,
  2591вҶ’+        isFixed: false,
  2592вҶ’+        isInstallment: t.isInstallment,
  2593вҶ’+        currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment,
  2594вҶ’+        totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments,
  2595вҶ’+      },
  2596вҶ’+    })
  2597вҶ’+    importedCount++
  2598вҶ’+  }
  2599вҶ’+
  2600вҶ’+  return editMessageText(
  2601вҶ’+    chatId,
  2602вҶ’+    messageId,
  2603вҶ’+    `вң… ${importedCount} transaГ§Гөes importadas com sucesso!`
  2604вҶ’+  )
  2605вҶ’+}
  2606вҶ’+```
  2607вҶ’+
  2608вҶ’+Update `handleCallbackQuery` to route csv_confirm:
  2609вҶ’+```typescript
  2610вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("csv_confirm:")) {
  2611вҶ’+    const importKey = data.replace("csv_confirm:", "")
  2612вҶ’+    return handleCsvConfirm(chatId, messageId, userId, importKey)
  2613вҶ’+  }
  2614вҶ’+```
  2615вҶ’+
  2616вҶ’+**Verification**: `npm run build`

  2618вҶ’+**On Failure**:
  2619вҶ’+- If `parseCSV` signature mismatch: Check `csv-parser.ts` for exact parameter names
  2620вҶ’+- If callback_data exceeds 64 bytes: Shorten importKey format
  2621вҶ’+- If pendingCsvImports memory grows: The cleanup loop handles expiration

  2643вҶ’+**Why**: TrГӘs consultas core do bot: resumo mensal (totais + orГ§amento geral), gastos por categoria (vs orГ§amento), e Гәltimas 10 transaГ§Гөes.

  2663вҶ’+```typescript
  2664вҶ’+import prisma from "@/lib/db"
  2665вҶ’+import { formatCurrency } from "@/lib/utils"
  2666вҶ’+import { sendMessage, type InlineKeyboardButton } from "./client"
  2667вҶ’+
  2668вҶ’+export async function handleSummaryQuery(chatId: number, userId: string) {
  2669вҶ’+  const now = new Date()
  2670вҶ’+  const month = now.getMonth() + 1
  2671вҶ’+  const year = now.getFullYear()
  2672вҶ’+
  2673вҶ’+  const monthStart = new Date(year, month - 1, 1)
  2674вҶ’+  const monthEnd = new Date(year, month, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999)
  2675вҶ’+
  2676вҶ’+  // Fetch transactions for current month
  2677вҶ’+  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
  2678вҶ’+    where: {
  2679вҶ’+      userId,
  2680вҶ’+      date: { gte: monthStart, lte: monthEnd },
  2681вҶ’+      deletedAt: null,
  2682вҶ’+    },
  2683вҶ’+    include: { investmentTransaction: true },
  2684вҶ’+  })
  2685вҶ’+
  2686вҶ’+  // Calculate totals (same logic as /api/summary)
  2687вҶ’+  let income = 0
  2688вҶ’+  let expense = 0
  2689вҶ’+  for (const t of transactions) {
  2690вҶ’+    if ((t as Record<string, unknown>).investmentTransaction) continue
  2691вҶ’+    if (t.type === "TRANSFER") continue
  2692вҶ’+    if (t.type === "INCOME") income += Math.abs(t.amount)
  2693вҶ’+    else if (t.type === "EXPENSE") expense += Math.abs(t.amount)
  2694вҶ’+  }
  2695вҶ’+  const balance = income - expense
  2696вҶ’+
  2697вҶ’+  // Get total budget
  2698вҶ’+  const budgets = await prisma.budget.findMany({
  2699вҶ’+    where: { userId, isActive: true },
  2700вҶ’+  })
  2701вҶ’+  const totalBudget = budgets.reduce((sum, b) => sum + b.amount, 0)
  2702вҶ’+
  2703вҶ’+  const monthName = monthStart.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
  2704вҶ’+
  2705вҶ’+  const lines = [
  2706вҶ’+    `рҹ“Ҡ Resumo - ${monthName}`,
  2707вҶ’+    "",
  2708вҶ’+    `Despesas:  ${formatCurrency(expense)}`,
  2709вҶ’+    `Receitas:  ${formatCurrency(income)}`,
  2710вҶ’+    `Saldo:     ${formatCurrency(balance)}`,
  2711вҶ’+  ]
  2712вҶ’+
  2713вҶ’+  if (totalBudget > 0) {
  2714вҶ’+    const pct = Math.round((expense / totalBudget) * 100)
  2715вҶ’+    const filled = Math.round(pct / 10)
  2716вҶ’+    const bar = "в–Ҳ".repeat(Math.min(filled, 10)) + "в–‘".repeat(Math.max(10 - filled, 0))
  2717вҶ’+    lines.push("")
  2718вҶ’+    lines.push(`OrГ§amento: ${formatCurrency(totalBudget)}`)
  2719вҶ’+    lines.push(`Usado:     ${pct}% ${bar}`)
  2720вҶ’+  }
  2721вҶ’+
  2722вҶ’+  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
  2723вҶ’+    reply_markup: {
  2724вҶ’+      inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "рҹ”ҷ Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }]],
  2725вҶ’+    },
  2726вҶ’+  })
  2727вҶ’+}
  2728вҶ’+
  2729вҶ’+export async function handleCategoryQuery(chatId: number, userId: string) {
  2730вҶ’+  const now = new Date()
  2731вҶ’+  const month = now.getMonth() + 1
  2732вҶ’+  const year = now.getFullYear()
  2733вҶ’+
  2734вҶ’+  const monthStart = new Date(year, month - 1, 1)
  2735вҶ’+  const monthEnd = new Date(year, month, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999)
  2736вҶ’+
  2737вҶ’+  // Fetch expense transactions with categories
  2738вҶ’+  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
  2739вҶ’+    where: {
  2740вҶ’+      userId,
  2741вҶ’+      type: "EXPENSE",
  2742вҶ’+      date: { gte: monthStart, lte: monthEnd },
  2743вҶ’+      deletedAt: null,
  2744вҶ’+    },
  2745вҶ’+    include: { category: true },
  2746вҶ’+  })
  2747вҶ’+
  2748вҶ’+  // Aggregate by category
  2749вҶ’+  const categoryTotals = new Map<string, { name: string; total: number }>()
  2750вҶ’+  for (const t of transactions) {
  2751вҶ’+    const catName = t.category?.name || "Sem categoria"
  2752вҶ’+    const catId = t.categoryId || "none"
  2753вҶ’+    const existing = categoryTotals.get(catId) || { name: catName, total: 0 }
  2754вҶ’+    existing.total += Math.abs(t.amount)
  2755вҶ’+    categoryTotals.set(catId, existing)
  2756вҶ’+  }
  2757вҶ’+
  2758вҶ’+  // Fetch budgets
  2759вҶ’+  const budgets = await prisma.budget.findMany({
  2760вҶ’+    where: { userId, isActive: true },
  2761вҶ’+    include: { category: true },
  2762вҶ’+  })
  2763вҶ’+  const budgetMap = new Map(budgets.map(b => [b.categoryId, b.amount]))
  2764вҶ’+
  2765вҶ’+  const monthName = monthStart.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
  2766вҶ’+
  2767вҶ’+  const lines = [`рҹҸ·пёҸ Gastos por categoria - ${monthName}`, ""]
  2768вҶ’+
  2769вҶ’+  // Sort by total descending
  2770вҶ’+  const sorted = [...categoryTotals.entries()].sort((a, b) => b[1].total - a[1].total)
  2771вҶ’+
  2772вҶ’+  for (const [catId, { name, total }] of sorted) {
  2773вҶ’+    const budget = budgetMap.get(catId)
  2774вҶ’+    if (budget) {
  2775вҶ’+      const pct = Math.round((total / budget) * 100)
  2776вҶ’+      const warning = pct >= 100 ? " вҡ пёҸ" : ""
  2777вҶ’+      lines.push(`${name}: ${formatCurrency(total)} / ${formatCurrency(budget)} (${pct}%)${warning}`)
  2778вҶ’+    } else {
  2779вҶ’+      lines.push(`${name}: ${formatCurrency(total)}`)
  2780вҶ’+    }
  2781вҶ’+  }
  2782вҶ’+
  2783вҶ’+  if (sorted.length === 0) {
  2784вҶ’+    lines.push("Nenhuma despesa neste mГӘs.")
  2785вҶ’+  }
  2786вҶ’+
  2787вҶ’+  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
  2788вҶ’+    reply_markup: {
  2789вҶ’+      inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "рҹ”ҷ Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }]],
  2790вҶ’+    },
  2791вҶ’+  })
  2792вҶ’+}
  2793вҶ’+
  2794вҶ’+export async function handleTransactionsQuery(
  2795вҶ’+  chatId: number,
  2796вҶ’+  userId: string,
  2797вҶ’+  offset: number = 0
  2798вҶ’+) {
  2799вҶ’+  const limit = 10
  2800вҶ’+  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
  2801вҶ’+    where: {
  2802вҶ’+      userId,
  2803вҶ’+      deletedAt: null,
  2804вҶ’+    },
  2805вҶ’+    include: { category: true },
  2806вҶ’+    orderBy: { date: "desc" },
  2807вҶ’+    skip: offset,
  2808вҶ’+    take: limit + 1, // Fetch one extra to check if there are more
  2809вҶ’+  })
  2810вҶ’+
  2811вҶ’+  const hasMore = transactions.length > limit
  2812вҶ’+  const display = transactions.slice(0, limit)
  2813вҶ’+
  2814вҶ’+  const lines = [`рҹ“Ӣ ${offset === 0 ? "Гҡltimas" : "Mais"} transaГ§Гөes`, ""]
  2815вҶ’+
  2816вҶ’+  for (const t of display) {
  2817вҶ’+    const date = new Date(t.date).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", {
  2818вҶ’+      day: "2-digit",
  2819вҶ’+      month: "2-digit",
  2820вҶ’+    })
  2821вҶ’+    const sign = t.type === "INCOME" ? "+" : "-"
  2822вҶ’+    const amount = formatCurrency(Math.abs(t.amount))
  2823вҶ’+    const cat = t.category?.name || ""
  2824вҶ’+    lines.push(`${date} ${t.description.substring(0, 25)}  ${sign}${amount}  ${cat}`)
  2825вҶ’+  }
  2826вҶ’+
  2827вҶ’+  if (display.length === 0) {
  2828вҶ’+    lines.push("Nenhuma transaГ§ГЈo encontrada.")
  2829вҶ’+  }
  2830вҶ’+
  2831вҶ’+  const keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][] = []
  2832вҶ’+  const navRow: InlineKeyboardButton[] = []
  2833вҶ’+  if (offset > 0) {
  2834вҶ’+    navRow.push({ text: "в¬…пёҸ Anteriores", callback_data: `txns:${Math.max(0, offset - limit)}` })
  2835вҶ’+  }
  2836вҶ’+  if (hasMore) {
  2837вҶ’+    navRow.push({ text: "вһЎпёҸ PrГіximas", callback_data: `txns:${offset + limit}` })
  2838вҶ’+  }
  2839вҶ’+  if (navRow.length > 0) keyboard.push(navRow)
  2840вҶ’+  keyboard.push([{ text: "рҹ”ҷ Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }])
  2841вҶ’+
  2842вҶ’+  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
  2843вҶ’+    reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard },
  2844вҶ’+  })
  2845вҶ’+}
  2846вҶ’+```

  2852вҶ’+- If formatCurrency import fails: Verify `@/lib/utils` path and export name

  3609вҶ’+import prisma from "@/lib/db"
  3610вҶ’+
  3611вҶ’+export interface DuplicateCheckParams {
  3612вҶ’+  userId: string
  3613вҶ’+  description: string
  3614вҶ’+  amount: number
  3615вҶ’+  date: Date
  3616вҶ’+}
  3617вҶ’+
  3618вҶ’+export async function findDuplicate({
  3619вҶ’+  userId,
  3620вҶ’+  description,
  3621вҶ’+  amount,
  3622вҶ’+  date,
  3623вҶ’+}: DuplicateCheckParams) {
  3624вҶ’+  // Normalize date to start/end of day
  3625вҶ’+  const dayStart = new Date(date)
  3626вҶ’+  dayStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
  3627вҶ’+  const dayEnd = new Date(date)
  3628вҶ’+  dayEnd.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999)
  3629вҶ’+
  3630вҶ’+  const duplicate = await prisma.transaction.findFirst({
  3631вҶ’+    where: {
  3632вҶ’+      userId,
  3633вҶ’+      description: {
  3634вҶ’+        equals: description.trim(),
  3635вҶ’+        mode: "insensitive",
  3636вҶ’+      },
  3637вҶ’+      amount,
  3638вҶ’+      date: {
  3639вҶ’+        gte: dayStart,
  3640вҶ’+        lte: dayEnd,
  3641вҶ’+      },
  3642вҶ’+      deletedAt: null,
  3643вҶ’+    },
  3644вҶ’+  })
  3645вҶ’+
  3646вҶ’+  return duplicate
  3647вҶ’+}
  3648вҶ’+
  3649вҶ’+export async function filterDuplicates(
  3650вҶ’+  userId: string,
  3651вҶ’+  transactions: Array<{ description: string; amount: number; date: Date }>
  3652вҶ’+): Promise<{ unique: typeof transactions; duplicateCount: number }> {
  3653вҶ’+  const unique: typeof transactions = []
  3654вҶ’+  let duplicateCount = 0
  3655вҶ’+
  3656вҶ’+  for (const t of transactions) {
  3657вҶ’+    const dup = await findDuplicate({
  3658вҶ’+      userId,
  3659вҶ’+      description: t.description,
  3660вҶ’+      amount: t.amount,
  3661вҶ’+      date: t.date,
  3662вҶ’+    })
  3663вҶ’+    if (dup) {
  3664вҶ’+      duplicateCount++
  3665вҶ’+    } else {
  3666вҶ’+      unique.push(t)
  3667вҶ’+    }
  3668вҶ’+  }
  3669вҶ’+
  3670вҶ’+  return { unique, duplicateCount }
  3671вҶ’+}
