  3677вҶ’@@ -0,0 +1,62 @@
  3678вҶ’+import prisma from "@/lib/db"
  3679вҶ’+import { sendMessage, type TelegramUpdate } from "./client"
  3680вҶ’+
  3681вҶ’+export async function handleUpdate(update: TelegramUpdate) {
  3682вҶ’+  const chatId =
  3683вҶ’+    update.message?.chat.id ??
  3684вҶ’+    update.callback_query?.message?.chat.id
  3685вҶ’+
  3686вҶ’+  if (!chatId) return
  3687вҶ’+
  3688вҶ’+  // Look up linked user
  3689вҶ’+  const link = await prisma.telegramLink.findUnique({
  3690вҶ’+    where: { chatId: String(chatId) },
  3691вҶ’+  })
  3692вҶ’+
  3693вҶ’+  // Handle /start command (linking) вҖ” always allowed, even without link
  3694вҶ’+  if (update.message?.text?.startsWith("/start")) {
  3695вҶ’+    const { handleStartCommand } = await import("./commands")
  3696вҶ’+    return handleStartCommand(update.message, link?.userId ?? null)
  3697вҶ’+  }
  3698вҶ’+
  3699вҶ’+  // All other commands require a linked account
  3700вҶ’+  if (!link) {
  3701вҶ’+    return sendMessage(
  3702вҶ’+      chatId,
  3703вҶ’+      "Conta nГЈo vinculada. Acesse as configuraГ§Гөes do MyPocket para vincular sua conta."
  3704вҶ’+    )
  3705вҶ’+  }
  3706вҶ’+
  3707вҶ’+  const userId = link.userId
  3708вҶ’+
  3709вҶ’+  // Route callback queries (inline keyboard buttons)
  3710вҶ’+  if (update.callback_query) {
  3711вҶ’+    const { handleCallbackQuery } = await import("./commands")
  3712вҶ’+    return handleCallbackQuery(update.callback_query, userId)
  3713вҶ’+  }
  3714вҶ’+
  3715вҶ’+  // Route text messages
  3716вҶ’+  if (update.message?.text) {
  3717вҶ’+    const text = update.message.text
  3718вҶ’+
  3719вҶ’+    if (text === "/menu") {
  3720вҶ’+      const { handleMenuCommand } = await import("./commands")
  3721вҶ’+      return handleMenuCommand(chatId, userId)
  3722вҶ’+    }
  3723вҶ’+
  3724вҶ’+    if (text === "/desvincular") {
  3725вҶ’+      const { handleUnlinkCommand } = await import("./commands")
  3726вҶ’+      return handleUnlinkCommand(chatId, userId)
  3727вҶ’+    }
  3728вҶ’+
  3729вҶ’+    // Default: try to parse as expense
  3730вҶ’+    const { handleExpenseMessage } = await import("./commands")
  3731вҶ’+    return handleExpenseMessage(update.message, userId)
  3732вҶ’+  }
  3733вҶ’+
  3734вҶ’+  // Route document messages (CSV files)
  3735вҶ’+  if (update.message?.document) {
  3736вҶ’+    const { handleDocumentMessage } = await import("./commands")
  3737вҶ’+    return handleDocumentMessage(update.message, userId)
  3738вҶ’+  }
  3739вҶ’+}

  4089вҶ’+export async function handleStartCommand(
  4090вҶ’+  message: TelegramMessage,
  4091вҶ’+  existingUserId: string | null
  4092вҶ’+) {
  4093вҶ’+  const chatId = message.chat.id
  4094вҶ’+  const text = message.text || ""
  4095вҶ’+  const token = text.replace("/start", "").trim()
  4096вҶ’+
  4097вҶ’+  if (!token) {
  4098вҶ’+    if (existingUserId) {
  4099вҶ’+      return sendMessage(
  4100вҶ’+        chatId,
  4101вҶ’+        "Sua conta jГЎ estГЎ vinculada! Envie /menu para ver as opГ§Гөes."
  4102вҶ’+      )
  4103вҶ’+    }
  4104вҶ’+    return sendMessage(
  4105вҶ’+      chatId,
  4106вҶ’+      "Bem-vindo ao MyPocket Bot!\n\nPara vincular sua conta, acesse ConfiguraГ§Гөes > Telegram no app e clique em \"Vincular Telegram\"."
  4107вҶ’+    )
  4108вҶ’+  }
  4109вҶ’+
  4110вҶ’+  // Validate token
  4111вҶ’+  const linkToken = await prisma.telegramLinkToken.findUnique({
  4112вҶ’+    where: { token },
  4113вҶ’+  })
  4114вҶ’+
  4115вҶ’+  if (!linkToken) {
  4116вҶ’+    return sendMessage(chatId, "Token invГЎlido. Gere um novo link nas configuraГ§Гөes do app.")
  4117вҶ’+  }
  4118вҶ’+
  4119вҶ’+  if (linkToken.expiresAt < new Date()) {
  4120вҶ’+    await prisma.telegramLinkToken.delete({ where: { id: linkToken.id } })
  4121вҶ’+    return sendMessage(chatId, "Token expirado. Gere um novo link nas configuraГ§Гөes do app.")
  4122вҶ’+  }
  4123вҶ’+
  4124вҶ’+  // Check if chatId already linked to another account
  4125вҶ’+  const existingChatLink = await prisma.telegramLink.findUnique({
  4126вҶ’+    where: { chatId: String(chatId) },
  4127вҶ’+  })
  4128вҶ’+  if (existingChatLink) {
  4129вҶ’+    return sendMessage(
  4130вҶ’+      chatId,
  4131вҶ’+      "Este chat jГЎ estГЎ vinculado a outra conta. Desvincule primeiro com /desvincular."
  4132вҶ’+    )
  4133вҶ’+  }
  4134вҶ’+
  4135вҶ’+  // Create link and delete token
  4136вҶ’+  try {
  4137вҶ’+    await prisma.$transaction([
  4138вҶ’+      prisma.telegramLink.create({
  4139вҶ’+        data: {
  4140вҶ’+          userId: linkToken.userId,
  4141вҶ’+          chatId: String(chatId),
  4142вҶ’+        },
  4143вҶ’+      }),
  4144вҶ’+      prisma.telegramLinkToken.delete({ where: { id: linkToken.id } }),
  4145вҶ’+    ])
  4146вҶ’+
  4147вҶ’+    return sendMessage(
  4148вҶ’+      chatId,
  4149вҶ’+      "Conta vinculada com sucesso! \n\nEnvie /menu para ver as opГ§Гөes disponГӯveis."
  4150вҶ’+    )
  4151вҶ’+  } catch (error) {
  4152вҶ’+    // Handle unique constraint violation (user already linked)
  4153вҶ’+    return sendMessage(
  4154вҶ’+      chatId,
  4155вҶ’+      "Erro ao vincular conta. Sua conta pode jГЎ estar vinculada a outro chat."
  4156вҶ’+    )
  4157вҶ’+  }
  4158вҶ’+}

  4160вҶ’+export async function handleUnlinkCommand(
  4161вҶ’+  chatId: number,
  4162вҶ’+  userId: string
  4163вҶ’+) {
  4164вҶ’+  await prisma.telegramLink.deleteMany({

  4172вҶ’+}

  4174вҶ’+export async function handleMenuCommand(
  4175вҶ’+  chatId: number,

  4183вҶ’+        [{ text: "рҹ“Ӣ Гҡltimas transaГ§Гөes", callback_data: "txns:0" }],

  4189вҶ’+export async function handleCallbackQuery(
  4190вҶ’+  query: TelegramCallbackQuery,
  4191вҶ’+  userId: string
  4192вҶ’+) {
  4193вҶ’+  const chatId = query.message?.chat.id
  4194вҶ’+  const messageId = query.message?.message_id
  4195вҶ’+  const data = query.data || ""
  4196вҶ’+
  4197вҶ’+  if (!chatId || !messageId) return
  4198вҶ’+
  4199вҶ’+  await answerCallbackQuery(query.id)
  4200вҶ’+
  4201вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("cancel:")) {
  4202вҶ’+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "OperaГ§ГЈo cancelada.")
  4203вҶ’+  }
  4204вҶ’+
  4205вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("confirm:")) {
  4206вҶ’+    const categoryIdFromData = data.replace("confirm:", "")
  4207вҶ’+    return handleConfirmExpense(chatId, messageId, userId, query.message!, categoryIdFromData !== "none" ? categoryIdFromData : null)
  4208вҶ’+  }
  4209вҶ’+
  4210вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("change_cat:")) {
  4211вҶ’+    return handleShowCategories(chatId, messageId, userId, query.message)
  4212вҶ’+  }
  4213вҶ’+
  4214вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("set_cat:")) {
  4215вҶ’+    const categoryId = data.replace("set_cat:", "")
  4216вҶ’+    return handleSetCategory(chatId, messageId, categoryId, query.message)
  4217вҶ’+  }
  4218вҶ’+
  4219вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("csv_confirm:")) {
  4220вҶ’+    const importKey = data.replace("csv_confirm:", "")
  4221вҶ’+    return handleCsvConfirm(chatId, messageId, userId, importKey)
  4222вҶ’+  }
  4223вҶ’+
  4224вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("csv_cancel:")) {
  4225вҶ’+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "ImportaГ§ГЈo cancelada.")
  4226вҶ’+  }
  4227вҶ’+
  4228вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("summary:")) {
  4229вҶ’+    return handleSummaryQuery(chatId, userId)
  4230вҶ’+  }
  4231вҶ’+
  4232вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("categories:")) {
  4233вҶ’+    return handleCategoryQuery(chatId, userId)
  4234вҶ’+  }
  4235вҶ’+
  4236вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("txns:")) {
  4237вҶ’+    const offset = parseInt(data.replace("txns:", "")) || 0
  4238вҶ’+    return handleTransactionsQuery(chatId, userId, offset)
  4239вҶ’+  }
  4240вҶ’+
  4241вҶ’+  if (data.startsWith("menu:")) {
  4242вҶ’+    return handleMenuCommand(chatId, userId)
  4243вҶ’+  }
  4244вҶ’+}
  4245вҶ’+
  4246вҶ’+export async function handleExpenseMessage(
  4247вҶ’+  message: TelegramMessage,
  4248вҶ’+  userId: string
  4249вҶ’+) {
  4250вҶ’+  const chatId = message.chat.id
  4251вҶ’+  const text = message.text || ""
  4252вҶ’+
  4253вҶ’+  const parsed = parseExpenseMessage(text)
  4254вҶ’+  if (!parsed) {
  4255вҶ’+    return sendMessage(
  4256вҶ’+      chatId,
  4257вҶ’+      "NГЈo consegui entender. Envie no formato:\nDESCRICAO VALOR DD/MM/AAAA\n\nExemplo: PIX RESTAURANTE 45,90 05/03/2026"
  4258вҶ’+    )
  4259вҶ’+  }
  4260вҶ’+
  4261вҶ’+  const { description, amount, date } = parsed
  4262вҶ’+
  4263вҶ’+  // Auto-categorize
  4264вҶ’+  const suggested = await suggestCategory(description, userId)
  4265вҶ’+  const categoryName = suggested?.name || "Sem categoria"
  4266вҶ’+  const categoryId = suggested?.id || null
  4267вҶ’+
  4268вҶ’+  // Format date for display
  4269вҶ’+  const dateStr = date.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")
  4270вҶ’+
  4271вҶ’+  const confirmData = `confirm:${categoryId || "none"}`
  4272вҶ’+  const changeCatData = `change_cat:0`
  4273вҶ’+  const cancelData = `cancel:0`
  4274вҶ’+
  4275вҶ’+  return sendMessage(chatId, [
  4276вҶ’+    "Nova despesa:",
  4277вҶ’+    `рҹ“қ ${description}`,
  4278вҶ’+    `рҹ’° ${formatCurrency(amount)}`,
  4279вҶ’+    `рҹ“… ${dateStr}`,
  4280вҶ’+    `рҹҸ·пёҸ ${categoryName}`,
  4281вҶ’+  ].join("\n"), {
  4282вҶ’+    reply_markup: {
  4283вҶ’+      inline_keyboard: [
  4284вҶ’+        [
  4285вҶ’+          { text: "вң… Confirmar", callback_data: confirmData },
  4286вҶ’+          { text: "вңҸпёҸ Categoria", callback_data: changeCatData },
  4287вҶ’+          { text: "вқҢ Cancelar", callback_data: cancelData },
  4288вҶ’+        ],
  4289вҶ’+      ],
  4290вҶ’+    },
  4291вҶ’+  })
  4292вҶ’+}
  4293вҶ’+
  4294вҶ’+async function handleConfirmExpense(
  4295вҶ’+  chatId: number,
  4296вҶ’+  messageId: number,
  4297вҶ’+  userId: string,
  4298вҶ’+  message: TelegramMessage,
  4299вҶ’+  overrideCategoryId: string | null = null
  4300вҶ’+) {
  4301вҶ’+  // Parse expense data from the confirmation message text
  4302вҶ’+  const text = message.text || ""
  4303вҶ’+  const lines = text.split("\n")
  4304вҶ’+
  4305вҶ’+  const descLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ“қ"))
  4306вҶ’+  const amountLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ’°"))
  4307вҶ’+  const dateLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ“…"))
  4308вҶ’+  const catLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹҸ·пёҸ"))
  4309вҶ’+
  4310вҶ’+  if (!descLine || !amountLine || !dateLine) {
  4311вҶ’+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Erro: dados da transaГ§ГЈo nГЈo encontrados.")
  4312вҶ’+  }
  4313вҶ’+
  4314вҶ’+  const description = descLine.replace("рҹ“қ ", "")
  4315вҶ’+  const amountStr = amountLine.replace("рҹ’° ", "").replace("R$", "").replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", ".").trim()
  4316вҶ’+  const amount = parseFloat(amountStr)
  4317вҶ’+  const dateParts = dateLine.replace("рҹ“… ", "").split("/")
  4318вҶ’+  const date = new Date(
  4319вҶ’+    parseInt(dateParts[2]),
  4320вҶ’+    parseInt(dateParts[1]) - 1,
  4321вҶ’+    parseInt(dateParts[0]),
  4322вҶ’+    12, 0, 0
  4323вҶ’+  )
  4324вҶ’+
  4325вҶ’+  // Resolve category
  4326вҶ’+  const categoryName = catLine?.replace("рҹҸ·пёҸ ", "") || "Sem categoria"
  4327вҶ’+  let category = null
  4328вҶ’+  if (overrideCategoryId) {
  4329вҶ’+    category = await prisma.category.findUnique({ where: { id: overrideCategoryId } })
  4330вҶ’+  } else if (categoryName !== "Sem categoria") {
  4331вҶ’+    category = await prisma.category.findFirst({
  4332вҶ’+      where: { name: categoryName, userId },
  4333вҶ’+    })
  4334вҶ’+  }
  4335вҶ’+
  4336вҶ’+  // Check for duplicate
  4337вҶ’+  const duplicate = await findDuplicate({
  4338вҶ’+    userId,
  4339вҶ’+    description,
  4340вҶ’+    amount: -Math.abs(amount),
  4341вҶ’+    date,
  4342вҶ’+  })
  4343вҶ’+
  4344вҶ’+  if (duplicate) {
  4345вҶ’+    return editMessageText(
  4346вҶ’+      chatId,
  4347вҶ’+      messageId,
  4348вҶ’+      `вҡ пёҸ TransaГ§ГЈo duplicata detectada!\n\nрҹ“қ ${description}\nрҹ’° ${formatCurrency(amount)}\nрҹ“… ${dateLine.replace("рҹ“… ", "")}\n\nEsta transaГ§ГЈo jГЎ existe no sistema.`
  4349вҶ’+    )
  4350вҶ’+  }
  4351вҶ’+
  4352вҶ’+  // Create transaction
  4353вҶ’+  await prisma.transaction.create({
  4354вҶ’+    data: {
  4355вҶ’+      userId,
  4356вҶ’+      description,
  4357вҶ’+      amount: -Math.abs(amount),
  4358вҶ’+      date,
  4359вҶ’+      type: "EXPENSE",
  4360вҶ’+      origin: "Telegram",
  4361вҶ’+      categoryId: category?.id || null,
  4362вҶ’+      isFixed: false,
  4363вҶ’+      isInstallment: false,
  4364вҶ’+    },
  4365вҶ’+  })
  4366вҶ’+
  4367вҶ’+  const finalCategoryName = category?.name || categoryName
  4368вҶ’+
  4369вҶ’+  return editMessageText(
  4370вҶ’+    chatId,
  4371вҶ’+    messageId,
  4372вҶ’+    `вң… Despesa registrada!\n\nрҹ“қ ${description}\nрҹ’° ${formatCurrency(amount)}\nрҹ“… ${dateLine.replace("рҹ“… ", "")}\nрҹҸ·пёҸ ${finalCategoryName}`
  4373вҶ’+  )
  4374вҶ’+}

  4376вҶ’+async function handleShowCategories(
  4377вҶ’+  chatId: number,
  4378вҶ’+  messageId: number,
  4379вҶ’+  userId: string,
  4380вҶ’+  currentMessage?: TelegramMessage
  4381вҶ’+) {
  4382вҶ’+  const categories = await prisma.category.findMany({
  4383вҶ’+    where: { userId },
  4384вҶ’+    orderBy: { name: "asc" },
  4385вҶ’+  })
  4386вҶ’+
  4387вҶ’+  if (categories.length === 0) {
  4388вҶ’+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Nenhuma categoria cadastrada.")
  4389вҶ’+  }
  4390вҶ’+
  4391вҶ’+  // Preserve expense data lines for when a category is selected
  4392вҶ’+  let expenseLines = ""
  4393вҶ’+  const msgText = currentMessage?.text || ""
  4394вҶ’+  const descLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ“қ"))
  4395вҶ’+  const amountLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ’°"))
  4396вҶ’+  const dateLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ“…"))
  4397вҶ’+
  4398вҶ’+  if (descLine && amountLine && dateLine) {
  4399вҶ’+    expenseLines = `\n${descLine}\n${amountLine}\n${dateLine}`
  4400вҶ’+  }
  4401вҶ’+
  4402вҶ’+  // Build keyboard with categories (max 2 per row)
  4403вҶ’+  const keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][] = []
  4404вҶ’+  for (let i = 0; i < categories.length; i += 2) {
  4405вҶ’+    const row: InlineKeyboardButton[] = [
  4406вҶ’+      { text: categories[i].name, callback_data: `set_cat:${categories[i].id}` },
  4407вҶ’+    ]
  4408вҶ’+    if (i + 1 < categories.length) {
  4409вҶ’+      row.push({
  4410вҶ’+        text: categories[i + 1].name,
  4411вҶ’+        callback_data: `set_cat:${categories[i + 1].id}`,
  4412вҶ’+      })
  4413вҶ’+    }
  4414вҶ’+    keyboard.push(row)
  4415вҶ’+  }
  4416вҶ’+
  4417вҶ’+  keyboard.push([{ text: "вқҢ Cancelar", callback_data: "cancel:0" }])
  4418вҶ’+
  4419вҶ’+  return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, `Selecione a categoria:${expenseLines}`, {
  4420вҶ’+    reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard },
  4421вҶ’+  })

  4471вҶ’+export async function handleDocumentMessage(
  4472вҶ’+  message: TelegramMessage,
  4473вҶ’+  userId: string
  4474вҶ’+) {
  4475вҶ’+  const chatId = message.chat.id
  4476вҶ’+  const doc = message.document
  4477вҶ’+
  4478вҶ’+  if (!doc) return
  4479вҶ’+
  4480вҶ’+  // Check file extension
  4481вҶ’+  const fileName = doc.file_name || ""
  4482вҶ’+  if (!fileName.toLowerCase().endsWith(".csv")) {
  4483вҶ’+    return sendMessage(chatId, "Apenas arquivos CSV sГЈo suportados.")
  4484вҶ’+  }
  4485вҶ’+
  4486вҶ’+  // Check file size (max 5MB to be safe)
  4487вҶ’+  if (doc.file_size && doc.file_size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
  4488вҶ’+    return sendMessage(chatId, "Arquivo muito grande. MГЎximo 5MB.")
  4489вҶ’+  }
  4490вҶ’+
  4491вҶ’+  try {
  4492вҶ’+    // Download file
  4493вҶ’+    const filePath = await getFile(doc.file_id)
  4494вҶ’+    if (!filePath) {
  4495вҶ’+      return sendMessage(chatId, "Erro ao acessar o arquivo.")
  4496вҶ’+    }
  4497вҶ’+
  4498вҶ’+    const content = await downloadFile(filePath)
  4499вҶ’+

4500вҶ’+    // Parse CSV
  4501вҶ’+    const origin = "Telegram"
  4502вҶ’+    const parsed = await parseCSV(content, origin)
  4503вҶ’+
  4504вҶ’+    if (parsed.length === 0) {
  4505вҶ’+      return sendMessage(chatId, "Nenhuma transaГ§ГЈo encontrada no arquivo.")
  4506вҶ’+    }
  4507вҶ’+
  4508вҶ’+    // Check for duplicates
  4509вҶ’+    let duplicateCount = 0
  4510вҶ’+    const uniqueTransactions: typeof parsed = []
  4511вҶ’+
  4512вҶ’+    for (const t of parsed) {
  4513вҶ’+      const amount = t.type === "EXPENSE" ? -Math.abs(t.amount) : Math.abs(t.amount)
  4514вҶ’+      const dup = await findDuplicate({
  4515вҶ’+        userId,
  4516вҶ’+        description: t.description,
  4517вҶ’+        amount,
  4518вҶ’+        date: t.date,
  4519вҶ’+      })
  4520вҶ’+      if (dup) {
  4521вҶ’+        duplicateCount++
  4522вҶ’+      } else {
  4523вҶ’+        uniqueTransactions.push(t)
  4524вҶ’+      }
  4525вҶ’+    }
  4526вҶ’+
  4527вҶ’+    if (uniqueTransactions.length === 0) {
  4528вҶ’+      return sendMessage(
  4529вҶ’+        chatId,
  4530вҶ’+        `Todas as ${parsed.length} transaГ§Гөes jГЎ existem no sistema.`
  4531вҶ’+      )
  4532вҶ’+    }
  4533вҶ’+
  4534вҶ’+    // Store for confirmation in database
  4535вҶ’+    // Clean expired entries first
  4536вҶ’+    await prisma.telegramPendingImport.deleteMany({
  4537вҶ’+      where: { expiresAt: { lt: new Date() } },
  4538вҶ’+    })
  4539вҶ’+
  4540вҶ’+    const pendingImport = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.create({
  4541вҶ’+      data: {
  4542вҶ’+        userId,
  4543вҶ’+        chatId: String(chatId),
  4544вҶ’+        payload: JSON.stringify(uniqueTransactions.map(t => ({
  4545вҶ’+          description: t.description,
  4546вҶ’+          amount: t.amount,
  4547вҶ’+          date: t.date,
  4548вҶ’+          categoryId: t.suggestedCategoryId || null,
  4549вҶ’+          isInstallment: t.isInstallment || false,
  4550вҶ’+          currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment || null,
  4551вҶ’+          totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments || null,
  4552вҶ’+          type: t.type || "EXPENSE",
  4553вҶ’+        }))),
  4554вҶ’+        origin,
  4555вҶ’+        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 10 * 60 * 1000),
  4556вҶ’+      },
  4557вҶ’+    })
  4558вҶ’+
  4559вҶ’+    const summaryLines = [
  4560вҶ’+      `рҹ“„ Arquivo: ${fileName}`,
  4561вҶ’+      `рҹ“Ҡ ${parsed.length} transaГ§Гөes encontradas`,
  4562вҶ’+    ]
  4563вҶ’+    if (duplicateCount > 0) {
  4564вҶ’+      summaryLines.push(`вҡ пёҸ ${duplicateCount} duplicatas ignoradas`)
  4565вҶ’+    }
  4566вҶ’+    summaryLines.push(`вң… ${uniqueTransactions.length} prontas para importar`)
  4567вҶ’+
  4568вҶ’+    return sendMessage(chatId, summaryLines.join("\n"), {
  4569вҶ’+      reply_markup: {
  4570вҶ’+        inline_keyboard: [
  4571вҶ’+          [
  4572вҶ’+            { text: "вң… Importar", callback_data: `csv_confirm:${pendingImport.id}` },
  4573вҶ’+            { text: "вқҢ Cancelar", callback_data: `csv_cancel:0` },
  4574вҶ’+          ],
  4575вҶ’+        ],
  4576вҶ’+      },
  4577вҶ’+    })
  4578вҶ’+  } catch (error) {
  4579вҶ’+    console.error("CSV import error:", error)
  4580вҶ’+    return sendMessage(
  4581вҶ’+      chatId,
  4582вҶ’+      "Erro ao processar o arquivo. Verifique se Г© um CSV vГЎlido (C6, ItaГә ou BTG)."
  4583вҶ’+    )
  4584вҶ’+  }
  4585вҶ’+}
  4586вҶ’+
  4587вҶ’+export async function handleCsvConfirm(
  4588вҶ’+  chatId: number,
  4589вҶ’+  messageId: number,
  4590вҶ’+  userId: string,
  4591вҶ’+  importId: string
  4592вҶ’+) {
  4593вҶ’+  const pending = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.findUnique({
  4594вҶ’+    where: { id: importId },
  4595вҶ’+  })
  4596вҶ’+  if (!pending || pending.expiresAt < new Date()) {
  4597вҶ’+    if (pending) await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
  4598вҶ’+    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "ImportaГ§ГЈo expirada. Envie o arquivo novamente.")
  4599вҶ’+  }
  4600вҶ’+
  4601вҶ’+  await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
  4602вҶ’+
  4603вҶ’+  const transactions = JSON.parse(pending.payload) as Array<{
  4604вҶ’+    description: string
  4605вҶ’+    amount: number
  4606вҶ’+    date: string | Date
  4607вҶ’+    categoryId: string | null
  4608вҶ’+    isInstallment: boolean
  4609вҶ’+    currentInstallment: number | null
  4610вҶ’+    totalInstallments: number | null
  4611вҶ’+    type: string
  4612вҶ’+  }>
  4613вҶ’+
  4614вҶ’+  let importedCount = 0
  4615вҶ’+  for (const t of transactions) {
  4616вҶ’+    const type = t.type || "EXPENSE"
  4617вҶ’+    let amount = t.amount
  4618вҶ’+    if (type === "EXPENSE" && amount > 0) amount = -amount
  4619вҶ’+    else if (type === "INCOME" && amount < 0) amount = Math.abs(amount)
  4620вҶ’+
  4621вҶ’+    const dateStr = typeof t.date === "string" && !(t.date as string).includes("T")
  4622вҶ’+      ? t.date + "T12:00:00"
  4623вҶ’+      : t.date
  4624вҶ’+    const transactionDate = new Date(dateStr)
  4625вҶ’+
  4626вҶ’+    await prisma.transaction.create({
  4627вҶ’+      data: {
  4628вҶ’+        userId,
  4629вҶ’+        description: t.description,
  4630вҶ’+        amount,
  4631вҶ’+        date: transactionDate,
  4632вҶ’+        type,
  4633вҶ’+        origin: pending!.origin,
  4634вҶ’+        categoryId: t.categoryId,
  4635вҶ’+        isFixed: false,
  4636вҶ’+        isInstallment: t.isInstallment,
  4637вҶ’+        currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment,
  4638вҶ’+        totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments,
  4639вҶ’+      },
  4640вҶ’+    })
  4641вҶ’+    importedCount++
  4642вҶ’+  }
  4643вҶ’+
  4644вҶ’+  return editMessageText(
  4645вҶ’+    chatId,
  4646вҶ’+    messageId,
  4647вҶ’+    `вң… ${importedCount} transaГ§Гөes importadas com sucesso!`
  4648вҶ’+  )
  4649вҶ’+}

  4889вҶ’+export interface ParsedExpense {
  4890вҶ’+  description: string
  4891вҶ’+  amount: number
  4892вҶ’+  date: Date
  4893вҶ’+}
  4894вҶ’+
  4895вҶ’+export function parseExpenseMessage(text: string): ParsedExpense | null {
  4896вҶ’+  const trimmed = text.trim()
  4897вҶ’+  if (!trimmed) return null
  4898вҶ’+
  4899вҶ’+  // We'll track parts to remove by position
  4900вҶ’+  const removals: Array<{ start: number; end: number }> = []
  4901вҶ’+
  4902вҶ’+  // Extract date (DD/MM/YYYY) вҖ” look for last occurrence
  4903вҶ’+  const dateRegex = /(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})/g
  4904вҶ’+  let dateMatch: RegExpExecArray | null = null
  4905вҶ’+  let lastDateMatch: RegExpExecArray | null = null
  4906вҶ’+  while ((dateMatch = dateRegex.exec(trimmed)) !== null) {
  4907вҶ’+    lastDateMatch = dateMatch
  4908вҶ’+  }
  4909вҶ’+
  4910вҶ’+  let date: Date
  4911вҶ’+  if (lastDateMatch) {
  4912вҶ’+    const [, day, month, year] = lastDateMatch
  4913вҶ’+    date = new Date(parseInt(year), parseInt(month) - 1, parseInt(day), 12, 0, 0)
  4914вҶ’+    removals.push({ start: lastDateMatch.index, end: lastDateMatch.index + lastDateMatch[0].length })
  4915вҶ’+  } else {
  4916вҶ’+    const now = new Date()
  4917вҶ’+    date = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), now.getDate(), 12, 0, 0)
  4918вҶ’+  }
  4919вҶ’+
  4920вҶ’+  // Extract amount вҖ” look for Brazilian number format (last occurrence)
  4921вҶ’+  // Matches: 45,90 | 1.234,56 | 1234,56
  4922вҶ’+  const amountRegex = /(\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{3})*,\d{2}|\d+,\d{2})/g
  4923вҶ’+  let amountMatch: RegExpExecArray | null = null
  4924вҶ’+  let lastAmountMatch: RegExpExecArray | null = null
  4925вҶ’+  while ((amountMatch = amountRegex.exec(trimmed)) !== null) {
  4926вҶ’+    lastAmountMatch = amountMatch
  4927вҶ’+  }
  4928вҶ’+
  4929вҶ’+  if (!lastAmountMatch) return null
  4930вҶ’+
  4931вҶ’+  const amountStr = lastAmountMatch[1]
  4932вҶ’+  const amount = parseFloat(amountStr.replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", "."))
  4933вҶ’+  if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) return null
  4934вҶ’+
  4935вҶ’+  removals.push({ start: lastAmountMatch.index, end: lastAmountMatch.index + lastAmountMatch[0].length })
  4936вҶ’+
  4937вҶ’+  // Build description by removing matched parts by position (sorted descending to preserve indices)
  4938вҶ’+  let description = trimmed
  4939вҶ’+  removals.sort((a, b) => b.start - a.start)
  4940вҶ’+  for (const { start, end } of removals) {
  4941вҶ’+    description = description.slice(0, start) + description.slice(end)
  4942вҶ’+  }
  4943вҶ’+  description = description.replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim()
  4944вҶ’+
  4945вҶ’+  if (!description) return null
  4946вҶ’+
  4947вҶ’+  return { description, amount, date }
  4948вҶ’+}

  4955вҶ’+import prisma from "@/lib/db"

  4959вҶ’+export async function handleSummaryQuery(chatId: number, userId: string) {
  4960вҶ’+  const now = new Date()
  4961вҶ’+  const month = now.getMonth() + 1
  4962вҶ’+  const year = now.getFullYear()
  4963вҶ’+
  4964вҶ’+  const monthStart = new Date(year, month - 1, 1)
  4965вҶ’+  const monthEnd = new Date(year, month, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999)
  4966вҶ’+
  4967вҶ’+  // Fetch transactions for current month
  4968вҶ’+  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
  4969вҶ’+    where: {
  4970вҶ’+      userId,
  4971вҶ’+      date: { gte: monthStart, lte: monthEnd },
  4972вҶ’+      deletedAt: null,
  4973вҶ’+    },
  4974вҶ’+    include: { investmentTransaction: true },
  4975вҶ’+  })
  4976вҶ’+
  4977вҶ’+  // Calculate totals (same logic as /api/summary)
  4978вҶ’+  let income = 0
  4979вҶ’+  let expense = 0
  4980вҶ’+  for (const t of transactions) {
  4981вҶ’+    if ((t as Record<string, unknown>).investmentTransaction) continue
  4982вҶ’+    if (t.type === "TRANSFER") continue
  4983вҶ’+    if (t.type === "INCOME") income += Math.abs(t.amount)
  4984вҶ’+    else if (t.type === "EXPENSE") expense += Math.abs(t.amount)
  4985вҶ’+  }
  4986вҶ’+  const balance = income - expense
  4987вҶ’+
  4988вҶ’+  // Get total budget
  4989вҶ’+  const budgets = await prisma.budget.findMany({
  4990вҶ’+    where: { userId, isActive: true },
  4991вҶ’+  })
  4992вҶ’+  const totalBudget = budgets.reduce((sum, b) => sum + b.amount, 0)
  4993вҶ’+
  4994вҶ’+  const monthName = monthStart.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
  4995вҶ’+
  4996вҶ’+  const lines = [
  4997вҶ’+    `рҹ“Ҡ Resumo - ${monthName}`,
  4998вҶ’+    "",
  4999вҶ’+    `Despesas:  ${formatCurrency(expense)}`,

5000вҶ’+    `Receitas:  ${formatCurrency(income)}`,
  5001вҶ’+    `Saldo:     ${formatCurrency(balance)}`,
  5002вҶ’+  ]
  5003вҶ’+
  5004вҶ’+  if (totalBudget > 0) {
  5005вҶ’+    const pct = Math.round((expense / totalBudget) * 100)
  5006вҶ’+    const filled = Math.round(pct / 10)
  5007вҶ’+    const bar = "в–Ҳ".repeat(Math.min(filled, 10)) + "в–‘".repeat(Math.max(10 - filled, 0))
  5008вҶ’+    lines.push("")
  5009вҶ’+    lines.push(`OrГ§amento: ${formatCurrency(totalBudget)}`)
  5010вҶ’+    lines.push(`Usado:     ${pct}% ${bar}`)
  5011вҶ’+  }
  5012вҶ’+
  5013вҶ’+  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
  5014вҶ’+    reply_markup: {
  5015вҶ’+      inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "рҹ”ҷ Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }]],
  5016вҶ’+    },
  5017вҶ’+  })
  5018вҶ’+}
  5019вҶ’+
  5020вҶ’+export async function handleCategoryQuery(chatId: number, userId: string) {
  5021вҶ’+  const now = new Date()
  5022вҶ’+  const month = now.getMonth() + 1
  5023вҶ’+  const year = now.getFullYear()
  5024вҶ’+
  5025вҶ’+  const monthStart = new Date(year, month - 1, 1)
  5026вҶ’+  const monthEnd = new Date(year, month, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999)
  5027вҶ’+
  5028вҶ’+  // Fetch expense transactions with categories
  5029вҶ’+  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
  5030вҶ’+    where: {
  5031вҶ’+      userId,
  5032вҶ’+      type: "EXPENSE",
  5033вҶ’+      date: { gte: monthStart, lte: monthEnd },
  5034вҶ’+      deletedAt: null,
  5035вҶ’+    },
  5036вҶ’+    include: { category: true },
  5037вҶ’+  })
  5038вҶ’+
  5039вҶ’+  // Aggregate by category
  5040вҶ’+  const categoryTotals = new Map<string, { name: string; total: number }>()
  5041вҶ’+  for (const t of transactions) {
  5042вҶ’+    const catName = t.category?.name || "Sem categoria"
  5043вҶ’+    const catId = t.categoryId || "none"
  5044вҶ’+    const existing = categoryTotals.get(catId) || { name: catName, total: 0 }
  5045вҶ’+    existing.total += Math.abs(t.amount)
  5046вҶ’+    categoryTotals.set(catId, existing)
  5047вҶ’+  }
  5048вҶ’+
  5049вҶ’+  // Fetch budgets
  5050вҶ’+  const budgets = await prisma.budget.findMany({
  5051вҶ’+    where: { userId, isActive: true },
  5052вҶ’+    include: { category: true },
  5053вҶ’+  })
  5054вҶ’+  const budgetMap = new Map(budgets.map(b => [b.categoryId, b.amount]))
  5055вҶ’+
  5056вҶ’+  const monthName = monthStart.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
  5057вҶ’+
  5058вҶ’+  const lines = [`рҹҸ·пёҸ Gastos por categoria - ${monthName}`, ""]
  5059вҶ’+
  5060вҶ’+  // Sort by total descending
  5061вҶ’+  const sorted = Array.from(categoryTotals.entries()).sort((a, b) => b[1].total - a[1].total)
  5062вҶ’+
  5063вҶ’+  for (const [catId, { name, total }] of sorted) {
  5064вҶ’+    const budget = budgetMap.get(catId)
  5065вҶ’+    if (budget) {
  5066вҶ’+      const pct = Math.round((total / budget) * 100)
  5067вҶ’+      const warning = pct >= 100 ? " вҡ пёҸ" : ""
  5068вҶ’+      lines.push(`${name}: ${formatCurrency(total)} / ${formatCurrency(budget)} (${pct}%)${warning}`)
  5069вҶ’+    } else {
  5070вҶ’+      lines.push(`${name}: ${formatCurrency(total)}`)
  5071вҶ’+    }
  5072вҶ’+  }
  5073вҶ’+
  5074вҶ’+  if (sorted.length === 0) {
  5075вҶ’+    lines.push("Nenhuma despesa neste mГӘs.")
  5076вҶ’+  }
  5077вҶ’+
  5078вҶ’+  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
  5079вҶ’+    reply_markup: {
  5080вҶ’+      inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "рҹ”ҷ Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }]],
  5081вҶ’+    },
  5082вҶ’+  })
  5083вҶ’+}
  5084вҶ’+
  5085вҶ’+export async function handleTransactionsQuery(
  5086вҶ’+  chatId: number,
  5087вҶ’+  userId: string,
  5088вҶ’+  offset: number = 0
  5089вҶ’+) {
  5090вҶ’+  const limit = 10
  5091вҶ’+  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
  5092вҶ’+    where: {
  5093вҶ’+      userId,
  5094вҶ’+      deletedAt: null,
  5095вҶ’+    },
  5096вҶ’+    include: { category: true },
  5097вҶ’+    orderBy: { date: "desc" },
  5098вҶ’+    skip: offset,
  5099вҶ’+    take: limit + 1, // Fetch one extra to check if there are more
  5100вҶ’+  })
  5101вҶ’+
  5102вҶ’+  const hasMore = transactions.length > limit
  5103вҶ’+  const display = transactions.slice(0, limit)
  5104вҶ’+
  5105вҶ’+  const lines = [`рҹ“Ӣ ${offset === 0 ? "Гҡltimas" : "Mais"} transaГ§Гөes`, ""]
  5106вҶ’+
  5107вҶ’+  for (const t of display) {
  5108вҶ’+    const date = new Date(t.date).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", {
  5109вҶ’+      day: "2-digit",
  5110вҶ’+      month: "2-digit",
  5111вҶ’+    })
  5112вҶ’+    const sign = t.type === "INCOME" ? "+" : "-"
  5113вҶ’+    const amount = formatCurrency(Math.abs(t.amount))
  5114вҶ’+    const cat = t.category?.name || ""
  5115вҶ’+    lines.push(`${date} ${t.description.substring(0, 25)}  ${sign}${amount}  ${cat}`)
  5116вҶ’+  }
  5117вҶ’+
  5118вҶ’+  if (display.length === 0) {
  5119вҶ’+    lines.push("Nenhuma transaГ§ГЈo encontrada.")
  5120вҶ’+  }
  5121вҶ’+
  5122вҶ’+  const keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][] = []
  5123вҶ’+  const navRow: InlineKeyboardButton[] = []
  5124вҶ’+  if (offset > 0) {
  5125вҶ’+    navRow.push({ text: "в¬…пёҸ Anteriores", callback_data: `txns:${Math.max(0, offset - limit)}` })
  5126вҶ’+  }
  5127вҶ’+  if (hasMore) {
  5128вҶ’+    navRow.push({ text: "вһЎпёҸ PrГіximas", callback_data: `txns:${offset + limit}` })
  5129вҶ’+  }
  5130вҶ’+  if (navRow.length > 0) keyboard.push(navRow)
  5131вҶ’+  keyboard.push([{ text: "рҹ”ҷ Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }])
  5132вҶ’+
  5133вҶ’+  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
  5134вҶ’+    reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard },
  5135вҶ’+  })
  5136вҶ’+}

    23вҶ’export async function handleStartCommand(
    24вҶ’  message: TelegramMessage,
    25вҶ’  existingUserId: string | null
    26вҶ’) {
    27вҶ’  const chatId = message.chat.id
    28вҶ’  const text = message.text || ""
    29вҶ’  const token = text.replace("/start", "").trim()
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’  if (!token) {
    32вҶ’    if (existingUserId) {
    33вҶ’      return sendMessage(
    34вҶ’        chatId,
    35вҶ’        "Sua conta jГЎ estГЎ vinculada! Envie /menu para ver as opГ§Гөes."
    36вҶ’      )
    37вҶ’    }
    38вҶ’    return sendMessage(
    39вҶ’      chatId,
    40вҶ’      "Bem-vindo ao MyPocket Bot!\n\nPara vincular sua conta, acesse ConfiguraГ§Гөes > Telegram no app e clique em \"Vincular Telegram\"."
    41вҶ’    )
    42вҶ’  }
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’  // Validate token
    45вҶ’  const linkToken = await prisma.telegramLinkToken.findUnique({
    46вҶ’    where: { token },
    47вҶ’  })
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’  if (!linkToken) {
    50вҶ’    return sendMessage(chatId, "Token invГЎlido. Gere um novo link nas configuraГ§Гөes do app.")
    51вҶ’  }
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’  if (linkToken.expiresAt < new Date()) {
    54вҶ’    await prisma.telegramLinkToken.delete({ where: { id: linkToken.id } })
    55вҶ’    return sendMessage(chatId, "Token expirado. Gere um novo link nas configuraГ§Гөes do app.")
    56вҶ’  }
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’  // Check if chatId already linked to another account
    59вҶ’  const existingChatLink = await prisma.telegramLink.findUnique({
    60вҶ’    where: { chatId: String(chatId) },
    61вҶ’  })
    62вҶ’  if (existingChatLink) {
    63вҶ’    return sendMessage(
    64вҶ’      chatId,
    65вҶ’      "Este chat jГЎ estГЎ vinculado a outra conta. Desvincule primeiro com /desvincular."
    66вҶ’    )
    67вҶ’  }
    68вҶ’
    69вҶ’  // Create link and delete token
    70вҶ’  try {
    71вҶ’    await prisma.$transaction([
    72вҶ’      prisma.telegramLink.create({
    73вҶ’        data: {
    74вҶ’          userId: linkToken.userId,
    75вҶ’          chatId: String(chatId),
    76вҶ’        },
    77вҶ’      }),
    78вҶ’      prisma.telegramLinkToken.delete({ where: { id: linkToken.id } }),
    79вҶ’    ])
    80вҶ’
    81вҶ’    return sendMessage(
    82вҶ’      chatId,
    83вҶ’      "Conta vinculada com sucesso! \n\nEnvie /menu para ver as opГ§Гөes disponГӯveis."
    84вҶ’    )
    85вҶ’  } catch (error) {
    86вҶ’    // Handle unique constraint violation (user already linked)
    87вҶ’    return sendMessage(
    88вҶ’      chatId,
    89вҶ’      "Erro ao vincular conta. Sua conta pode jГЎ estar vinculada a outro chat."
    90вҶ’    )
    91вҶ’  }
    92вҶ’}
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’export async function handleUnlinkCommand(
    95вҶ’  chatId: number,
    96вҶ’  userId: string
    97вҶ’) {
    98вҶ’  await prisma.telegramLink.deleteMany({
    99вҶ’    where: { userId },
   100вҶ’  })
   101вҶ’
   102вҶ’  return sendMessage(
   103вҶ’    chatId,
   104вҶ’    "Conta desvinculada. Para vincular novamente, acesse ConfiguraГ§Гөes > Telegram no app."
   105вҶ’  )
   106вҶ’}
   107вҶ’
   108вҶ’export async function handleMenuCommand(
   109вҶ’  chatId: number,
   110вҶ’  userId: string
   111вҶ’) {
   112вҶ’  return sendMessage(chatId, "рҹ“Ҡ MyPocket - Menu", {
   113вҶ’    reply_markup: {
   114вҶ’      inline_keyboard: [
   115вҶ’        [{ text: "рҹ“Ҳ Resumo do mГӘs", callback_data: "summary:0" }],
   116вҶ’        [{ text: "рҹҸ·пёҸ Gastos por categoria", callback_data: "categories:0" }],
   117вҶ’        [{ text: "рҹ“Ӣ Гҡltimas transaГ§Гөes", callback_data: "txns:0" }],

   123вҶ’export async function handleCallbackQuery(
   124вҶ’  query: TelegramCallbackQuery,
   125вҶ’  userId: string
   126вҶ’) {
   127вҶ’  const chatId = query.message?.chat.id
   128вҶ’  const messageId = query.message?.message_id
   129вҶ’  const data = query.data || ""
   130вҶ’
   131вҶ’  if (!chatId || !messageId) return
   132вҶ’

   139вҶ’  if (data.startsWith("confirm:")) {
   140вҶ’    const categoryIdFromData = data.replace("confirm:", "")

   142вҶ’  }

   144вҶ’  if (data.startsWith("change_cat:")) {
   145вҶ’    return handleShowCategories(chatId, messageId, userId, query.message)
   146вҶ’  }
   147вҶ’
   148вҶ’  if (data.startsWith("set_cat:")) {
   149вҶ’    const categoryId = data.replace("set_cat:", "")
   150вҶ’    return handleSetCategory(chatId, messageId, categoryId, query.message)
   151вҶ’  }
   152вҶ’
   153вҶ’  if (data.startsWith("csv_confirm:")) {
   154вҶ’    const importKey = data.replace("csv_confirm:", "")
   155вҶ’    return handleCsvConfirm(chatId, messageId, userId, importKey)
   156вҶ’  }
   157вҶ’
   158вҶ’  if (data.startsWith("csv_cancel:")) {
   159вҶ’    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "ImportaГ§ГЈo cancelada.")
   160вҶ’  }
   161вҶ’
   162вҶ’  if (data.startsWith("summary:")) {
   163вҶ’    return handleSummaryQuery(chatId, userId)
   164вҶ’  }
   165вҶ’
   166вҶ’  if (data.startsWith("categories:")) {
   167вҶ’    return handleCategoryQuery(chatId, userId)
   168вҶ’  }
   169вҶ’
   170вҶ’  if (data.startsWith("txns:")) {
   171вҶ’    const offset = parseInt(data.replace("txns:", "")) || 0
   172вҶ’    return handleTransactionsQuery(chatId, userId, offset)
   173вҶ’  }
   174вҶ’
   175вҶ’  if (data.startsWith("menu:")) {
   176вҶ’    return handleMenuCommand(chatId, userId)
   177вҶ’  }
   178вҶ’}
   179вҶ’
   180вҶ’export async function handleExpenseMessage(
   181вҶ’  message: TelegramMessage,
   182вҶ’  userId: string
   183вҶ’) {
   184вҶ’  const chatId = message.chat.id
   185вҶ’  const text = message.text || ""
   186вҶ’
   187вҶ’  const parsed = parseExpenseMessage(text)
   188вҶ’  if (!parsed) {
   189вҶ’    return sendMessage(
   190вҶ’      chatId,
   191вҶ’      "NГЈo consegui entender. Envie no formato:\nDESCRICAO VALOR DD/MM/AAAA\n\nExemplo: PIX RESTAURANTE 45,90 05/03/2026"
   192вҶ’    )
   193вҶ’  }
   194вҶ’
   195вҶ’  const { description, amount, date } = parsed
   196вҶ’
   197вҶ’  // Auto-categorize
   198вҶ’  const suggested = await suggestCategory(description, userId)
   199вҶ’  const categoryName = suggested?.name || "Sem categoria"
   200вҶ’  const categoryId = suggested?.id || null
   201вҶ’
   202вҶ’  // Format date for display
   203вҶ’  const dateStr = date.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")
   204вҶ’
   205вҶ’  const confirmData = `confirm:${categoryId || "none"}`
   206вҶ’  const changeCatData = `change_cat:0`
   207вҶ’  const cancelData = `cancel:0`
   208вҶ’
   209вҶ’  return sendMessage(chatId, [
   210вҶ’    "Nova despesa:",

   214вҶ’    `рҹҸ·пёҸ ${categoryName}`,
   215вҶ’  ].join("\n"), {
   216вҶ’    reply_markup: {

   221вҶ’          { text: "вқҢ Cancelar", callback_data: cancelData },

   227вҶ’
   228вҶ’async function handleConfirmExpense(
   229вҶ’  chatId: number,
   230вҶ’  messageId: number,
   231вҶ’  userId: string,
   232вҶ’  message: TelegramMessage,
   233вҶ’  overrideCategoryId: string | null = null
   234вҶ’) {
   235вҶ’  // Parse expense data from the confirmation message text
   236вҶ’  const text = message.text || ""
   237вҶ’  const lines = text.split("\n")
   238вҶ’
   239вҶ’  const descLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ“қ"))
   240вҶ’  const amountLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ’°"))
   241вҶ’  const dateLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ“…"))
   242вҶ’  const catLine = lines.find(l => l.startsWith("рҹҸ·пёҸ"))
   243вҶ’
   244вҶ’  if (!descLine || !amountLine || !dateLine) {
   245вҶ’    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Erro: dados da transaГ§ГЈo nГЈo encontrados.")
   246вҶ’  }
   247вҶ’
   248вҶ’  const description = descLine.replace("рҹ“қ ", "")
   249вҶ’  const amountStr = amountLine.replace("рҹ’° ", "").replace("R$", "").replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", ".").trim()
   250вҶ’  const amount = parseFloat(amountStr)
   251вҶ’  const dateParts = dateLine.replace("рҹ“… ", "").split("/")
   252вҶ’  const date = new Date(
   253вҶ’    parseInt(dateParts[2]),
   254вҶ’    parseInt(dateParts[1]) - 1,
   255вҶ’    parseInt(dateParts[0]),
   256вҶ’    12, 0, 0
   257вҶ’  )
   258вҶ’
   259вҶ’  // Resolve category
   260вҶ’  const categoryName = catLine?.replace("рҹҸ·пёҸ ", "") || "Sem categoria"
   261вҶ’  let category = null
   262вҶ’  if (overrideCategoryId) {
   263вҶ’    category = await prisma.category.findUnique({ where: { id: overrideCategoryId } })
   264вҶ’  } else if (categoryName !== "Sem categoria") {
   265вҶ’    category = await prisma.category.findFirst({
   266вҶ’      where: { name: categoryName, userId },
   267вҶ’    })
   268вҶ’  }
   269вҶ’
   270вҶ’  // Check for duplicate
   271вҶ’  const duplicate = await findDuplicate({
   272вҶ’    userId,
   273вҶ’    description,
   274вҶ’    amount: -Math.abs(amount),
   275вҶ’    date,
   276вҶ’  })
   277вҶ’
   278вҶ’  if (duplicate) {
   279вҶ’    return editMessageText(
   280вҶ’      chatId,
   281вҶ’      messageId,
   282вҶ’      `вҡ пёҸ TransaГ§ГЈo duplicata detectada!\n\nрҹ“қ ${description}\nрҹ’° ${formatCurrency(amount)}\nрҹ“… ${dateLine.replace("рҹ“… ", "")}\n\nEsta transaГ§ГЈo jГЎ existe no sistema.`
   283вҶ’    )
   284вҶ’  }
   285вҶ’
   286вҶ’  // Create transaction
   287вҶ’  await prisma.transaction.create({
   288вҶ’    data: {
   289вҶ’      userId,
   290вҶ’      description,
   291вҶ’      amount: -Math.abs(amount),
   292вҶ’      date,
   293вҶ’      type: "EXPENSE",
   294вҶ’      origin: "Telegram",
   295вҶ’      categoryId: category?.id || null,
   296вҶ’      isFixed: false,
   297вҶ’      isInstallment: false,
   298вҶ’    },
   299вҶ’  })
   300вҶ’
   301вҶ’  const finalCategoryName = category?.name || categoryName
   302вҶ’
   303вҶ’  return editMessageText(
   304вҶ’    chatId,
   305вҶ’    messageId,
   306вҶ’    `вң… Despesa registrada!\n\nрҹ“қ ${description}\nрҹ’° ${formatCurrency(amount)}\nрҹ“… ${dateLine.replace("рҹ“… ", "")}\nрҹҸ·пёҸ ${finalCategoryName}`
   307вҶ’  )
   308вҶ’}

   310вҶ’async function handleShowCategories(
   311вҶ’  chatId: number,
   312вҶ’  messageId: number,
   313вҶ’  userId: string,
   314вҶ’  currentMessage?: TelegramMessage
   315вҶ’) {
   316вҶ’  const categories = await prisma.category.findMany({
   317вҶ’    where: { userId },
   318вҶ’    orderBy: { name: "asc" },
   319вҶ’  })
   320вҶ’
   321вҶ’  if (categories.length === 0) {
   322вҶ’    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "Nenhuma categoria cadastrada.")
   323вҶ’  }
   324вҶ’
   325вҶ’  // Preserve expense data lines for when a category is selected
   326вҶ’  let expenseLines = ""
   327вҶ’  const msgText = currentMessage?.text || ""
   328вҶ’  const descLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ“қ"))
   329вҶ’  const amountLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ’°"))
   330вҶ’  const dateLine = msgText.split("\n").find(l => l.startsWith("рҹ“…"))
   331вҶ’
   332вҶ’  if (descLine && amountLine && dateLine) {
   333вҶ’    expenseLines = `\n${descLine}\n${amountLine}\n${dateLine}`
   334вҶ’  }
   335вҶ’
   336вҶ’  // Build keyboard with categories (max 2 per row)
   337вҶ’  const keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][] = []
   338вҶ’  for (let i = 0; i < categories.length; i += 2) {

   340вҶ’      { text: categories[i].name, callback_data: `set_cat:${categories[i].id}` },
   341вҶ’    ]
   342вҶ’    if (i + 1 < categories.length) {
   343вҶ’      row.push({
   344вҶ’        text: categories[i + 1].name,
   345вҶ’        callback_data: `set_cat:${categories[i + 1].id}`,
   346вҶ’      })
   347вҶ’    }
   348вҶ’    keyboard.push(row)
   349вҶ’  }
   350вҶ’
   351вҶ’  keyboard.push([{ text: "вқҢ Cancelar", callback_data: "cancel:0" }])
   352вҶ’
   353вҶ’  return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, `Selecione a categoria:${expenseLines}`, {
   354вҶ’    reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard },
   355вҶ’  })

   405вҶ’export async function handleDocumentMessage(
   406вҶ’  message: TelegramMessage,
   407вҶ’  userId: string
   408вҶ’) {
   409вҶ’  const chatId = message.chat.id
   410вҶ’  const doc = message.document
   411вҶ’
   412вҶ’  if (!doc) return
   413вҶ’
   414вҶ’  // Check file extension
   415вҶ’  const fileName = doc.file_name || ""
   416вҶ’  if (!fileName.toLowerCase().endsWith(".csv")) {
   417вҶ’    return sendMessage(chatId, "Apenas arquivos CSV sГЈo suportados.")
   418вҶ’  }
   419вҶ’
   420вҶ’  // Check file size (max 5MB to be safe)
   421вҶ’  if (doc.file_size && doc.file_size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
   422вҶ’    return sendMessage(chatId, "Arquivo muito grande. MГЎximo 5MB.")
   423вҶ’  }
   424вҶ’
   425вҶ’  try {
   426вҶ’    // Download file
   427вҶ’    const filePath = await getFile(doc.file_id)
   428вҶ’    if (!filePath) {
   429вҶ’      return sendMessage(chatId, "Erro ao acessar o arquivo.")
   430вҶ’    }
   431вҶ’
   432вҶ’    const content = await downloadFile(filePath)
   433вҶ’
   434вҶ’    // Parse CSV
   435вҶ’    const origin = "Telegram"
   436вҶ’    const parsed = await parseCSV(content, origin)
   437вҶ’
   438вҶ’    if (parsed.length === 0) {
   439вҶ’      return sendMessage(chatId, "Nenhuma transaГ§ГЈo encontrada no arquivo.")
   440вҶ’    }
   441вҶ’
   442вҶ’    // Check for duplicates
   443вҶ’    let duplicateCount = 0
   444вҶ’    const uniqueTransactions: typeof parsed = []
   445вҶ’
   446вҶ’    for (const t of parsed) {
   447вҶ’      const amount = t.type === "EXPENSE" ? -Math.abs(t.amount) : Math.abs(t.amount)
   448вҶ’      const dup = await findDuplicate({
   449вҶ’        userId,
   450вҶ’        description: t.description,
   451вҶ’        amount,
   452вҶ’        date: t.date,
   453вҶ’      })
   454вҶ’      if (dup) {
   455вҶ’        duplicateCount++
   456вҶ’      } else {
   457вҶ’        uniqueTransactions.push(t)
   458вҶ’      }
   459вҶ’    }
   460вҶ’
   461вҶ’    if (uniqueTransactions.length === 0) {
   462вҶ’      return sendMessage(
   463вҶ’        chatId,
   464вҶ’        `Todas as ${parsed.length} transaГ§Гөes jГЎ existem no sistema.`
   465вҶ’      )
   466вҶ’    }
   467вҶ’
   468вҶ’    // Store for confirmation in database
   469вҶ’    // Clean expired entries first
   470вҶ’    await prisma.telegramPendingImport.deleteMany({
   471вҶ’      where: { expiresAt: { lt: new Date() } },
   472вҶ’    })
   473вҶ’
   474вҶ’    const pendingImport = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.create({
   475вҶ’      data: {
   476вҶ’        userId,
   477вҶ’        chatId: String(chatId),
   478вҶ’        payload: JSON.stringify(uniqueTransactions.map(t => ({
   479вҶ’          description: t.description,
   480вҶ’          amount: t.amount,
   481вҶ’          date: t.date,
   482вҶ’          categoryId: t.suggestedCategoryId || null,
   483вҶ’          isInstallment: t.isInstallment || false,
   484вҶ’          currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment || null,
   485вҶ’          totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments || null,
   486вҶ’          type: t.type || "EXPENSE",
   487вҶ’        }))),
   488вҶ’        origin,
   489вҶ’        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 10 * 60 * 1000),
   490вҶ’      },
   491вҶ’    })
   492вҶ’
   493вҶ’    const summaryLines = [
   494вҶ’      `рҹ“„ Arquivo: ${fileName}`,
   495вҶ’      `рҹ“Ҡ ${parsed.length} transaГ§Гөes encontradas`,
   496вҶ’    ]
   497вҶ’    if (duplicateCount > 0) {
   498вҶ’      summaryLines.push(`вҡ пёҸ ${duplicateCount} duplicatas ignoradas`)
   499вҶ’    }
   500вҶ’    summaryLines.push(`вң… ${uniqueTransactions.length} prontas para importar`)
   501вҶ’
   502вҶ’    return sendMessage(chatId, summaryLines.join("\n"), {
   503вҶ’      reply_markup: {
   504вҶ’        inline_keyboard: [
   505вҶ’          [
   506вҶ’            { text: "вң… Importar", callback_data: `csv_confirm:${pendingImport.id}` },
   507вҶ’            { text: "вқҢ Cancelar", callback_data: `csv_cancel:0` },
   508вҶ’          ],
   509вҶ’        ],
   510вҶ’      },
   511вҶ’    })
   512вҶ’  } catch (error) {
   513вҶ’    console.error("CSV import error:", error)
   514вҶ’    return sendMessage(
   515вҶ’      chatId,
   516вҶ’      "Erro ao processar o arquivo. Verifique se Г© um CSV vГЎlido (C6, ItaГә ou BTG)."
   517вҶ’    )
   518вҶ’  }
   519вҶ’}

   521вҶ’export async function handleCsvConfirm(
   522вҶ’  chatId: number,
   523вҶ’  messageId: number,
   524вҶ’  userId: string,
   525вҶ’  importId: string
   526вҶ’) {
   527вҶ’  const pending = await prisma.telegramPendingImport.findUnique({
   528вҶ’    where: { id: importId },
   529вҶ’  })
   530вҶ’  if (!pending || pending.expiresAt < new Date()) {
   531вҶ’    if (pending) await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
   532вҶ’    return editMessageText(chatId, messageId, "ImportaГ§ГЈo expirada. Envie o arquivo novamente.")
   533вҶ’  }
   534вҶ’
   535вҶ’  await prisma.telegramPendingImport.delete({ where: { id: importId } })
   536вҶ’
   537вҶ’  const transactions = JSON.parse(pending.payload) as Array<{
   538вҶ’    description: string
   539вҶ’    amount: number
   540вҶ’    date: string | Date
   541вҶ’    categoryId: string | null
   542вҶ’    isInstallment: boolean
   543вҶ’    currentInstallment: number | null
   544вҶ’    totalInstallments: number | null
   545вҶ’    type: string
   546вҶ’  }>
   547вҶ’
   548вҶ’  let importedCount = 0
   549вҶ’  for (const t of transactions) {
   550вҶ’    const type = t.type || "EXPENSE"
   551вҶ’    let amount = t.amount
   552вҶ’    if (type === "EXPENSE" && amount > 0) amount = -amount
   553вҶ’    else if (type === "INCOME" && amount < 0) amount = Math.abs(amount)
   554вҶ’
   555вҶ’    const dateStr = typeof t.date === "string" && !(t.date as string).includes("T")
   556вҶ’      ? t.date + "T12:00:00"
   557вҶ’      : t.date
   558вҶ’    const transactionDate = new Date(dateStr)
   559вҶ’
   560вҶ’    await prisma.transaction.create({
   561вҶ’      data: {
   562вҶ’        userId,
   563вҶ’        description: t.description,
   564вҶ’        amount,
   565вҶ’        date: transactionDate,
   566вҶ’        type,
   567вҶ’        origin: pending!.origin,
   568вҶ’        categoryId: t.categoryId,
   569вҶ’        isFixed: false,
   570вҶ’        isInstallment: t.isInstallment,
   571вҶ’        currentInstallment: t.currentInstallment,
   572вҶ’        totalInstallments: t.totalInstallments,
   573вҶ’      },
   574вҶ’    })
   575вҶ’    importedCount++
   576вҶ’  }
   577вҶ’
   578вҶ’  return editMessageText(
   579вҶ’    chatId,
   580вҶ’    messageId,
   581вҶ’    `вң… ${importedCount} transaГ§Гөes importadas com sucesso!`
   582вҶ’  )
   583вҶ’}

1вҶ’import type { NextAuthConfig } from "next-auth"
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’// Edge-compatible config (used by middleware)
     4вҶ’// This file should NOT import Prisma or bcrypt (not edge-compatible)
     5вҶ’export const authConfig = {
     6вҶ’  pages: {
     7вҶ’    signIn: "/auth/login",
     8вҶ’    error: "/auth/error",
     9вҶ’  },
    10вҶ’  callbacks: {
    11вҶ’    authorized({ auth, request: { nextUrl } }) {
    12вҶ’      const isLoggedIn = !!auth?.user
    13вҶ’      const isOnAuthPage = nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/auth")
    14вҶ’      const isApiAuthRoute = nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/api/auth")
    15вҶ’      const isLandingPage = nextUrl.pathname === "/"
    16вҶ’      const isTelegramWebhook = nextUrl.pathname === "/api/telegram/webhook"
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’      // Allow landing page, auth pages, auth API routes, and Telegram webhook without authentication
    19вҶ’      if (isLandingPage || isOnAuthPage || isApiAuthRoute || isTelegramWebhook) {
    20вҶ’        return true
    21вҶ’      }
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’      // Redirect to login if not authenticated
    24вҶ’      if (!isLoggedIn) {
    25вҶ’        return false
    26вҶ’      }
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’      return true
    29вҶ’    },
    30вҶ’  },
    31вҶ’  providers: [], // Providers are added in auth.ts
    32вҶ’} satisfies NextAuthConfig
    33вҶ’

1вҶ’import prisma from "@/lib/db"
     2вҶ’import { formatCurrency } from "@/lib/utils"
     3вҶ’import { sendMessage, type InlineKeyboardButton } from "./client"
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’export async function handleSummaryQuery(chatId: number, userId: string) {
     6вҶ’  const now = new Date()
     7вҶ’  const month = now.getMonth() + 1
     8вҶ’  const year = now.getFullYear()
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’  const monthStart = new Date(year, month - 1, 1)
    11вҶ’  const monthEnd = new Date(year, month, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999)
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’  // Fetch transactions for current month
    14вҶ’  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
    15вҶ’    where: {
    16вҶ’      userId,
    17вҶ’      date: { gte: monthStart, lte: monthEnd },
    18вҶ’      deletedAt: null,
    19вҶ’    },
    20вҶ’    include: { investmentTransaction: true },
    21вҶ’  })
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’  // Calculate totals (same logic as /api/summary)
    24вҶ’  let income = 0
    25вҶ’  let expense = 0
    26вҶ’  for (const t of transactions) {
    27вҶ’    if ((t as Record<string, unknown>).investmentTransaction) continue
    28вҶ’    if (t.type === "TRANSFER") continue
    29вҶ’    if (t.type === "INCOME") income += Math.abs(t.amount)
    30вҶ’    else if (t.type === "EXPENSE") expense += Math.abs(t.amount)
    31вҶ’  }
    32вҶ’  const balance = income - expense
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’  // Get total budget
    35вҶ’  const budgets = await prisma.budget.findMany({
    36вҶ’    where: { userId, isActive: true },
    37вҶ’  })
    38вҶ’  const totalBudget = budgets.reduce((sum, b) => sum + b.amount, 0)
    39вҶ’
    40вҶ’  const monthName = monthStart.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’  const lines = [
    43вҶ’    `рҹ“Ҡ Resumo - ${monthName}`,
    44вҶ’    "",
    45вҶ’    `Despesas:  ${formatCurrency(expense)}`,
    46вҶ’    `Receitas:  ${formatCurrency(income)}`,
    47вҶ’    `Saldo:     ${formatCurrency(balance)}`,
    48вҶ’  ]
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’  if (totalBudget > 0) {
    51вҶ’    const pct = Math.round((expense / totalBudget) * 100)
    52вҶ’    const filled = Math.round(pct / 10)
    53вҶ’    const bar = "в–Ҳ".repeat(Math.min(filled, 10)) + "в–‘".repeat(Math.max(10 - filled, 0))
    54вҶ’    lines.push("")
    55вҶ’    lines.push(`OrГ§amento: ${formatCurrency(totalBudget)}`)
    56вҶ’    lines.push(`Usado:     ${pct}% ${bar}`)
    57вҶ’  }
    58вҶ’
    59вҶ’  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
    60вҶ’    reply_markup: {
    61вҶ’      inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "рҹ”ҷ Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }]],
    62вҶ’    },
    63вҶ’  })
    64вҶ’}
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’export async function handleCategoryQuery(chatId: number, userId: string) {
    67вҶ’  const now = new Date()
    68вҶ’  const month = now.getMonth() + 1
    69вҶ’  const year = now.getFullYear()
    70вҶ’
    71вҶ’  const monthStart = new Date(year, month - 1, 1)
    72вҶ’  const monthEnd = new Date(year, month, 0, 23, 59, 59, 999)
    73вҶ’
    74вҶ’  // Fetch expense transactions with categories
    75вҶ’  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
    76вҶ’    where: {
    77вҶ’      userId,
    78вҶ’      type: "EXPENSE",
    79вҶ’      date: { gte: monthStart, lte: monthEnd },
    80вҶ’      deletedAt: null,
    81вҶ’    },
    82вҶ’    include: { category: true },
    83вҶ’  })
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’  // Aggregate by category
    86вҶ’  const categoryTotals = new Map<string, { name: string; total: number }>()
    87вҶ’  for (const t of transactions) {
    88вҶ’    const catName = t.category?.name || "Sem categoria"
    89вҶ’    const catId = t.categoryId || "none"
    90вҶ’    const existing = categoryTotals.get(catId) || { name: catName, total: 0 }
    91вҶ’    existing.total += Math.abs(t.amount)
    92вҶ’    categoryTotals.set(catId, existing)
    93вҶ’  }
    94вҶ’
    95вҶ’  // Fetch budgets
    96вҶ’  const budgets = await prisma.budget.findMany({
    97вҶ’    where: { userId, isActive: true },
    98вҶ’    include: { category: true },
    99вҶ’  })
   100вҶ’  const budgetMap = new Map(budgets.map(b => [b.categoryId, b.amount]))
   101вҶ’
   102вҶ’  const monthName = monthStart.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", { month: "long", year: "numeric" })
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’  const lines = [`рҹҸ·пёҸ Gastos por categoria - ${monthName}`, ""]
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’  // Sort by total descending
   107вҶ’  const sorted = Array.from(categoryTotals.entries()).sort((a, b) => b[1].total - a[1].total)
   108вҶ’
   109вҶ’  for (const [catId, { name, total }] of sorted) {
   110вҶ’    const budget = budgetMap.get(catId)
   111вҶ’    if (budget) {
   112вҶ’      const pct = Math.round((total / budget) * 100)
   113вҶ’      const warning = pct >= 100 ? " вҡ пёҸ" : ""
   114вҶ’      lines.push(`${name}: ${formatCurrency(total)} / ${formatCurrency(budget)} (${pct}%)${warning}`)
   115вҶ’    } else {
   116вҶ’      lines.push(`${name}: ${formatCurrency(total)}`)
   117вҶ’    }
   118вҶ’  }
   119вҶ’
   120вҶ’  if (sorted.length === 0) {
   121вҶ’    lines.push("Nenhuma despesa neste mГӘs.")
   122вҶ’  }
   123вҶ’
   124вҶ’  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
   125вҶ’    reply_markup: {
   126вҶ’      inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "рҹ”ҷ Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }]],
   127вҶ’    },
   128вҶ’  })
   129вҶ’}
   130вҶ’
   131вҶ’export async function handleTransactionsQuery(
   132вҶ’  chatId: number,
   133вҶ’  userId: string,
   134вҶ’  offset: number = 0
   135вҶ’) {
   136вҶ’  const limit = 10
   137вҶ’  const transactions = await prisma.transaction.findMany({
   138вҶ’    where: {
   139вҶ’      userId,
   140вҶ’      deletedAt: null,
   141вҶ’    },
   142вҶ’    include: { category: true },
   143вҶ’    orderBy: { date: "desc" },
   144вҶ’    skip: offset,
   145вҶ’    take: limit + 1, // Fetch one extra to check if there are more
   146вҶ’  })
   147вҶ’
   148вҶ’  const hasMore = transactions.length > limit
   149вҶ’  const display = transactions.slice(0, limit)
   150вҶ’
   151вҶ’  const lines = [`рҹ“Ӣ ${offset === 0 ? "Гҡltimas" : "Mais"} transaГ§Гөes`, ""]
   152вҶ’
   153вҶ’  for (const t of display) {
   154вҶ’    const date = new Date(t.date).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", {
   155вҶ’      day: "2-digit",
   156вҶ’      month: "2-digit",
   157вҶ’    })
   158вҶ’    const sign = t.type === "INCOME" ? "+" : "-"
   159вҶ’    const amount = formatCurrency(Math.abs(t.amount))
   160вҶ’    const cat = t.category?.name || ""
   161вҶ’    lines.push(`${date} ${t.description.substring(0, 25)}  ${sign}${amount}  ${cat}`)
   162вҶ’  }
   163вҶ’
   164вҶ’  if (display.length === 0) {
   165вҶ’    lines.push("Nenhuma transaГ§ГЈo encontrada.")
   166вҶ’  }
   167вҶ’
   168вҶ’  const keyboard: InlineKeyboardButton[][] = []
   169вҶ’  const navRow: InlineKeyboardButton[] = []
   170вҶ’  if (offset > 0) {
   171вҶ’    navRow.push({ text: "в¬…пёҸ Anteriores", callback_data: `txns:${Math.max(0, offset - limit)}` })
   172вҶ’  }
   173вҶ’  if (hasMore) {
   174вҶ’    navRow.push({ text: "вһЎпёҸ PrГіximas", callback_data: `txns:${offset + limit}` })
   175вҶ’  }
   176вҶ’  if (navRow.length > 0) keyboard.push(navRow)
   177вҶ’  keyboard.push([{ text: "рҹ”ҷ Menu", callback_data: "menu:0" }])
   178вҶ’
   179вҶ’  return sendMessage(chatId, lines.join("\n"), {
   180вҶ’    reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: keyboard },
   181вҶ’  })
   182вҶ’}
   183вҶ’

1вҶ’import prisma from "@/lib/db"
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’export interface DuplicateCheckParams {
     4вҶ’  userId: string
     5вҶ’  description: string
     6вҶ’  amount: number
     7вҶ’  date: Date
     8вҶ’}
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’export async function findDuplicate({
    11вҶ’  userId,
    12вҶ’  description,
    13вҶ’  amount,
    14вҶ’  date,
    15вҶ’}: DuplicateCheckParams) {
    16вҶ’  // Normalize date to start/end of day
    17вҶ’  const dayStart = new Date(date)
    18вҶ’  dayStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
    19вҶ’  const dayEnd = new Date(date)
    20вҶ’  dayEnd.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999)
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’  const duplicate = await prisma.transaction.findFirst({
    23вҶ’    where: {
    24вҶ’      userId,
    25вҶ’      description: {
    26вҶ’        equals: description.trim(),
    27вҶ’        mode: "insensitive",
    28вҶ’      },
    29вҶ’      amount,
    30вҶ’      date: {
    31вҶ’        gte: dayStart,
    32вҶ’        lte: dayEnd,
    33вҶ’      },
    34вҶ’      deletedAt: null,
    35вҶ’    },
    36вҶ’  })
    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’  return duplicate
    39вҶ’}
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’export async function filterDuplicates(
    42вҶ’  userId: string,
    43вҶ’  transactions: Array<{ description: string; amount: number; date: Date }>
    44вҶ’): Promise<{ unique: typeof transactions; duplicateCount: number }> {
    45вҶ’  const unique: typeof transactions = []
    46вҶ’  let duplicateCount = 0
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’  for (const t of transactions) {
    49вҶ’    const dup = await findDuplicate({
    50вҶ’      userId,
    51вҶ’      description: t.description,
    52вҶ’      amount: t.amount,
    53вҶ’      date: t.date,
    54вҶ’    })
    55вҶ’    if (dup) {
    56вҶ’      duplicateCount++
    57вҶ’    } else {
    58вҶ’      unique.push(t)
    59вҶ’    }
    60вҶ’  }
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’  return { unique, duplicateCount }
    63вҶ’}
    64вҶ’

**IMPORTANT:**

6. `handleSetCategory` - validate category belongs to user
7. Import via bot without importBatchId/recurring matching (bigger refactor - let me think about scope)


8. N+1 queries in dedup

For #5, the simplest fix without schema changes is to reuse TelegramPendingImport for single expenses too, since callback_data is limited to 64 bytes and encoding the data there won't work. Let me focus on what the user actually asked forвҖ”the critical and important fixes.

For #5, I need to make the message parsing more robust against `NaN` errors from format changes, or store the data in TelegramPendingImport. For #7, extracting a shared import service is too big a refactor, so I'll add importBatchId at minimum and note the rest as a TODO. For #8, I can implement batch dedup to fix the N+1 problem.

Now I'm mapping out the specific changes: adding timing-safe equality checks to the webhook route, excluding the Telegram setup endpoint from auth, validating user IDs in the CSV confirmation handler, lazy-loading the Telegram API client, and continuing through the remaining fixes.

For the expense confirmation handler, storing the parsed data in TelegramPendingImport when the message first arrives, then retrieving it on confirm, avoids re-parsing from text. For the category handler, I need to thread the userId through the function call chain to properly filter categories by user.

I'll add a unique batch ID to the CSV import flow and create a batch deduplication function to catch duplicates within the same import. Now I'm ready to start implementing these changes.

     4вҶ’export async function handleUpdate(update: TelegramUpdate) {
     5вҶ’  const chatId =
     6вҶ’    update.message?.chat.id ??
     7вҶ’    update.callback_query?.message?.chat.id
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’  if (!chatId) return
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’  // Look up linked user

    13вҶ’    where: { chatId: String(chatId) },
    14вҶ’  })
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’  // Handle /start command (linking) вҖ” always allowed, even without link
    17вҶ’  if (update.message?.text?.startsWith("/start")) {
    18вҶ’    const { handleStartCommand } = await import("./commands")
    19вҶ’    return handleStartCommand(update.message, link?.userId ?? null)
    20вҶ’  }
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’  // All other commands require a linked account
    23вҶ’  if (!link) {
    24вҶ’    return sendMessage(

    32вҶ’  // Route callback queries (inline keyboard buttons)
    33вҶ’  if (update.callback_query) {
    34вҶ’    const { handleCallbackQuery } = await import("./commands")
    35вҶ’    return handleCallbackQuery(update.callback_query, userId)
    36вҶ’  }
    37вҶ’

    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’    if (text === "/menu") {
    43вҶ’      const { handleMenuCommand } = await import("./commands")

    49вҶ’      return handleUnlinkCommand(chatId, userId)

    51вҶ’

content.text: The case-insensitive matching. The `filterDuplicates` uses `toLowerCase()` in memory but the mock data has exact case match. The issue is that the test transaction date `new Date("2026-03-05")` gives different hours than the mock `new Date("2026-03-05T12:00:00")`, which means different dates. Let me debug:

input.command: node -e "const d = new Date('2026-03-05'); console.log(d.getFullYear(), d.getMonth(), d.getDate())"

content.text: The issue is `new Date("2026-03-05")` is parsed as UTC midnight, which in local timezone becomes March 4. So the dates don't match. Fix the test:

content.text:
Todas as correГ§Гөes aplicadas. Resumo:

### Corrigido

| # | Severidade | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Critical** | Webhook secret agora usa `crypto.timingSafeEqual` |
| 2 | **Critical** | `handleCsvConfirm` valida `pending.userId !== userId` |
| 3 | **Critical** | `/api/telegram/setup` adicionado Г s exceГ§Гөes do middleware |
| 4 | **Important** | `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` agora Г© avaliado via getter lazy (`getTelegramApi()`) |
| 5 | **Important** | `handleConfirmExpense` armazena dados em `TelegramPendingImport` ao invГ©s de parsear texto da mensagem |
| 6 | **Important** | `handleSetCategory` valida que a categoria pertence ao `userId` |
| 7 | **Important** | `filterDuplicates` agora faz batch query (1 query) ao invГ©s de N+1 |

449вҶ’export async function handleDocumentMessage(
   450вҶ’  message: TelegramMessage,

content.thinking:
Now I understand the three findings:

1. **Origin hardcoded as "Telegram"** вҖ” `detectBankFromContent` exists in csv-parser.ts but isn't used by the bot. I should use it to detect the real origin from the CSV content.

2. **handleCsvConfirm doesn't reuse import pipeline** вҖ” The bot's CSV confirm creates transactions directly without recurring expense matching, carryover detection, etc. The proper fix is to extract the import logic from the API route into a shared service function, then call it from both places.

3. **parseCSV autocategorization without userId** вҖ” `parseCSV` calls `suggestCategory(parsed.description)` without userId. 

For the fixes, I need to use `detectBankFromContent` to get the actual bank instead of hardcoding "Telegram", extract the import logic from the API route into a shared service so both the bot and API use the same pipeline, and handle category suggestions with userId either by passing it through to parseCSV or re-categorizing after parsing in the bot.

Looking at what the import route actually doesвҖ”recurring expense matching, dedup checking, category validation, transaction creation with all the metadata, and carryover linkingвҖ”extracting this into a shared service is the right move. I'll create that service module with the core import logic.

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: /Users/victor/.claude/skills/committing-changes

# Committing Changes

Create git commits for changes made during this session.

## Process

1. **Analyze changes:**
   - Run `git status` and `git diff` to understand modifications
   - Consider whether changes should be one or multiple logical commits

2. **Plan commits:**
   - Group related files together
   - Draft clear commit messages in imperative mood
   - Focus on why changes were made

3. **Execute upon confirmation:**
   - Use `git add` with specific files (never `-A` or `.`)
   - Create commits with `git commit -n -m "message"`
   - Show result with `git log --oneline -n [N]`

## Critical Rules

- **NEVER add Claude attribution** - no co-author lines, no "Generated with Claude"
- Write commit messages as if the user wrote them
- Keep commits atomic and focused

content.text:
PR merged. Agora, o que precisa para o Telegram funcionar:

---

## Setup do Bot Telegram

### 1. Criar o bot no Telegram

1. Abrir o Telegram e conversar com **@BotFather**
2. Enviar `/newbot`
3. Escolher um nome (ex: "MyPocket Bot")
4. Escolher um username (ex: `mypocket_finance_bot`)
5. Anotar o **token** que o BotFather retorna

### 2. VariГЎveis de ambiente

Adicionar no `.env` (ou no Vercel/hosting):

```env
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=<token do BotFather>
REDACTED
TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET=<string aleatГіria forte, ex: openssl rand -hex 32>
TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET=<outra string aleatГіria para proteger o endpoint de setup>
```

### 3. Rodar a migration

```bash
npm run db:migrate
```

Isso cria as 3 tabelas novas: `TelegramLink`, `TelegramLinkToken`, `TelegramPendingImport`.

### 4. Registrar o webhook no Telegram

ApГіs deploy, chamar o endpoint de setup:

```bash
curl -X POST https://SEU-DOMINIO/api/telegram/webhook \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-setup-secret: <TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET>" \
  -d '{"webhookUrl": "https://SEU-DOMINIO/api/telegram/webhook"}'
```

**CorreГ§ГЈo**: na verdade o endpoint de setup Г© `/api/telegram/setup`:

```bash
curl -X POST https://SEU-DOMINIO/api/telegram/setup \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-setup-secret: <TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET>" \
  -d '{"webhookUrl": "https://SEU-DOMINIO/api/telegram/webhook"}'
```

### 5. Vincular conta

1. Ir em **ConfiguraГ§Гөes > Telegram** no app web
2. Clicar em "Vincular Telegram" вҖ” gera um deep link
3. Clicar no link вҖ” abre o bot no Telegram
4. O bot confirma a vinculaГ§ГЈo

Depois disso: enviar texto livre para registrar despesas, enviar CSV para importar, `/menu` para consultar.
